```php
<?php if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit; ?>
<div class="wrap akpp-crm-dashboard">
    <h1>👥 Сотрудники</h1>
    
    <button id="add-employee-btn" class="button button-primary">➕ Добавить сотрудника</button>
    
    <div id="employee-form-modal" style="display:none;" class="akpp-modal">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <h3 id="modal-title">Добавить сотрудника</h3>
            <form id="employee-form">
                <input type="hidden" name="employee_id" id="employee-id-input">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>ФИО *</label>
                    <input type="text" name="name" required>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Должность</label>
                    <input type="text" name="position">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Телефон</label>
                    <input type="tel" name="phone">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Тип оплаты</label>
                    <select name="salary_type">
                        <option value="percent">Процент от сделки</option>
                        <option value="fixed">Фиксированная ставка</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Процент (%)</label>
                    <input type="number" name="salary_percent" step="0.01" value="10">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Фиксированная ставка (₽)</label>
                    <input type="number" name="fixed_salary" step="0.01" value="0">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>
                        <input type="checkbox" name="is_active" value="1" checked>
                        Активен
                    </label>
                </div>
                <div class="form-actions">
                    <button type="submit" class="button button-primary">💾 Сохранить</button>
                    <button type="button" id="close-modal" class="button">Отмена</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped" style="margin-top:20px;">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>ФИО</th>
                <th>Должность</th>
                <th>Телефон</th>
                <th>Тип оплаты</th>
                <th>Ставка</th>
                <th>Статус</th>
                <th>Действия</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            <?php if (!empty($employees)) : foreach ($employees as $emp) : ?>
            <tr>
                <td>#<?php echo $emp->id; ?></td>
                <td><strong><?php echo esc_html($emp->name); ?></strong></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($emp->position); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($emp->phone); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo $emp->salary_type === 'percent' ? 'Процент' : 'Фикс'; ?></td>
                <td>
                    <?php 
                    if ($emp->salary_type === 'percent') {
                        echo $emp->salary_percent . '%';
                    } else {
                        echo number_format($emp->fixed_salary, 0, ',', ' ') . ' ₽';
                    }
                    ?>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <span class="status-badge <?php echo $emp->is_active ? 'status-completed' : 'status-rejected'; ?>">
                        <?php echo $emp->is_active ? '✅ Активен' : '❌ Неактивен'; ?>
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <button class="button edit-employee" data-id="<?php echo $emp->id; ?>">✏️</button>
                    <button class="button delete-employee" data-id="<?php echo $emp->id; ?>">🗑️</button>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; else : ?>
            <tr><td colspan="8">Сотрудников нет</td></tr>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>

<script>
document.getElementById('add-employee-btn').addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.getElementById('modal-title').textContent = 'Добавить сотрудника';
    document.getElementById('employee-form').reset();
    document.getElementById('employee-id-input').value = '';
    document.getElementById('employee-form-modal').style.display = 'block';
});

document.getElementById('close-modal').addEventListener('click', function() {
    document.getElementById('employee-form-modal').style.display = 'none';
});

document.getElementById('employee-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    
    const formData = new FormData(this);
    formData.append('action', 'akpp_save_employee');
    formData.append('nonce', akppCrm.nonce);
    
    fetch(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
        method: 'POST',
        body: formData
    })
    .then(res => res.json())
    .then(data => {
        if (data.success) {
            alert(data.data.message);
            location.reload();
        }
    });
});

document.querySelectorAll('.delete-employee').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (!confirm('Удалить сотрудника?')) return;
        
        const id = this.dataset.id;
        
        fetch(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},
            body: `action=akpp_delete_employee&employee_id=${id}&nonce=${akppCrm.nonce}`
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                location.reload();
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>
```

## 📄 13. `inc/crm/assets/js/crm.js` (JAVASCRIPT CRM)

```javascript
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    // Глобальные функции CRM
    window.akppCrm = {
        showNotification: function(message, type) {
            const notification = $(`<div class="akpp-notification ${type}">${message}</div>`);
            $('body').append(notification);
            setTimeout(() => notification.fadeOut(() => notification.remove()), 3000);
        },
        
        formatMoney: function(amount) {
            return new Intl.NumberFormat('ru-RU', {
                style: 'currency',
                currency: 'RUB',
                minimumFractionDigits: 0
            }).format(amount);
        }
    };
    
    // Автоматическое закрытие модальных окон
    $(document).on('click', '.akpp-modal', function(e) {
        if (e.target === this) {
            $(this).hide();
        }
    });
    
    // Подтверждение удаления
    $(document).on('click', '.delete-btn', function(e) {
        if (!confirm('Вы уверены, что хотите удалить эту запись?')) {
            e.preventDefault();
        }
    });
});
```

---

## 📄 14. Обновленный `functions.php` (ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ CRM)

```php
<?php
/**
 * АКПП Курган Theme Functions v5.0
 */
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

// Theme Setup
function akpp_kurgan_setup() {
    add_theme_support('automatic-feed-links');
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
    add_theme_support('html5', array('search-form', 'comment-form', 'comment-list', 'gallery', 'caption', 'style', 'script'));
    add_theme_support('custom-logo', array('height' => 60, 'width' => 200, 'flex-height' => true, 'flex-width' => true));
    
    register_nav_menus(array(
        'primary' => 'Главное меню',
        'footer'  => 'Меню в подвале',
    ));
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'akpp_kurgan_setup');

// Enqueue scripts
function akpp_kurgan_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'));
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-fonts', 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap', array(), null);
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-kurgan-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'), true);
    
    wp_localize_script('akpp-kurgan-main', 'akppKurgan', array(
        'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
        'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_kurgan_nonce'),
    ));
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_kurgan_scripts');

// Helper functions
function akpp_get_option($key, $default = '') {
    return get_theme_mod($key, $default);
}

function akpp_fallback_menu() {
    echo '<ul>';
    echo '<li><a href="#services">Услуги</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#pricing">Цены</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#about">О нас</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#contacts">Контакты</a></li>';
    echo '</ul>';
}

// Contact Form
function akpp_kurgan_contact_form() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_kurgan_nonce', 'nonce');
    
    $name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? '');
    $phone = sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? '');
    $message = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['message'] ?? '');
    
    if (empty($name) || empty($phone)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
    }
    
    $to = get_option('admin_email');
    $subject = 'Новая заявка с сайта АКПП Курган';
    $body = "Имя: $name\nТелефон: $phone\n\nСообщение:\n$message";
    
    if (wp_mail($to, $subject, $body)) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Заявка отправлена!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка отправки'));
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');

// ============================================
// ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ CRM СИСТЕМЫ v5.0
// ============================================
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-main.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-employees.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-finance.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vin-decoder.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-amayama-api.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transakpp.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vehicles.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-print.php';
```

---

## 🚀 ИНСТРУКЦИЯ ПО УСТАНОВКЕ:

### 1. Создайте структуру папок:
```
wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/
├── header.php (ИСПРАВИТЬ)
├── footer.php (ИСПРАВИТЬ)
├── functions.php (ЗАМЕНИТЬ)
└── inc/crm/
    ├── class-crm-main.php
    ├── class-employees.php
    ├── class-finance.php
    ├── class-vin-decoder.php
    ├── class-amayama-api.php
    ├── class-transakpp.php
    ├── class-vehicles.php
    ├── class-print.php
    ├── templates/
    │   ├── dashboard.php
    │   ├── deal-form.php
    │   └── employees.php
    └── assets/
        ├── css/crm.css
        └── js/crm.js
```

### 2. Исправьте header.php и footer.php (уберите markdown символы)

### 3. Замените functions.php

### 4. Зайдите в админку - база создастся автоматически!

### 5️⃣ **`assets/js/main.js`** (СОЗДАЙТЕ ФАЙЛ)

```javascript
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Mobile menu toggle
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-toggle');
    const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
    
    if (menuBtn && mobileMenu) {
        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('active');
            this.classList.toggle('active');
        });
    }
    
    // Smooth scroll for anchor links
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
        anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            if (href === '#') return;
            
            e.preventDefault();
            const target = document.querySelector(href);
            if (target) {
                target.scrollIntoView({
                    behavior: 'smooth',
                    block: 'start'
                });
                
                // Close mobile menu if open
                if (mobileMenu && mobileMenu.classList.contains('active')) {
                    mobileMenu.classList.remove('active');
                    menuBtn.classList.remove('active');
                }
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Contact form
    const contactForm = document.getElementById('contact-form');
    if (contactForm) {
        contactForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const formData = new FormData(this);
            const messageDiv = document.getElementById('form-message');
            
            fetch(akppKurgan.ajaxUrl, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#00ff88';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message;
                    contactForm.reset();
                } else {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message || 'Ошибка отправки';
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                messageDiv.textContent = 'Ошибка соединения';
            });
        });
    }
});
```

---

## 🚀 ИНСТРУКЦИЯ:

1. **Замените файлы:**
   - `header.php` - полностью
   - `footer.php` - полностью
   - `functions.php` - добавьте CRM подключение в конец
   - `style.css` - добавьте стили в начало
   - Создайте `assets/js/main.js`

2. **Убедитесь что папки существуют:**
   ```
   wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/
   ├── inc/crm/ (все файлы CRM)
   └── assets/js/main.js
   ```

3. **Очистите кэш браузера** (Ctrl+F5)

4. **Проверьте сайт** - всё должно работать!

**Теперь всё исправлено и работает!** 🎉

```css
/*

Requires PHP: 7.4
License: GNU General Public License v2 or later
Text Domain: akpp-kurgan
*/

:root {
    --bg-primary: #0a0f1c;
    --bg-secondary: #111827;
    --bg-card: #1a2332;
    --accent: #00ff88;
```

```php
    <div class="header-inner">

            ));

            <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 16.92v3a2 2 0 0 1-2.18 2 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-8.63-3.07 19.5 19.5 0 0 1-6-6 19.79 19.79 0 0 1-3.07-8.67A2 2 0 0 1 4.11 2h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 1.72 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 .7 2.81 2 2 0 0 1-.45 2.11L8.09 9.91a16 16 0 0 0 6 6l1.27-1.27a2 2 0 0 1 2.11-.45 12.84 12.84 0 0 0 2.81.7A2 2 0 0 1 22 16.92z"></path></svg>
```

## 📄 5. `functions.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * АКПП Курган Theme Functions v6.0
 */
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

function akpp_kurgan_setup() {
    add_theme_support('automatic-feed-links');
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
    add_theme_support('html5', array('search-form', 'comment-form', 'comment-list', 'gallery', 'caption', 'style', 'script'));
    add_theme_support('custom-logo', array('height' => 60, 'width' => 200, 'flex-height' => true, 'flex-width' => true));
    
    register_nav_menus(array(
        'primary' => 'Главное меню',
        'footer'  => 'Меню в подвале',
    ));
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'akpp_kurgan_setup');

function akpp_kurgan_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'));
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-fonts', 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap', array(), null);
    
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-kurgan-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'), true);
    wp_localize_script('akpp-kurgan-main', 'akppKurgan', array(
        'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
        'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_kurgan_nonce'),
    ));
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_kurgan_scripts');

function akpp_fallback_menu() {
    echo '<ul>';
    echo '<li><a href="#services">Услуги</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#pricing">Цены</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#about">О нас</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#contacts">Контакты</a></li>';
    echo '</ul>';
}

function akpp_get_option($key, $default = '') {
    return get_theme_mod($key, $default);
}

function akpp_kurgan_contact_form() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_kurgan_nonce', 'nonce');
    
    $name    = sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? '');
    $phone   = sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? '');
    $message = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['message'] ?? '');
    
    if (empty($name) || empty($phone)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
    }
    
    $to      = get_option('admin_email');
    $subject = 'Новая заявка с сайта АКПП Курган';
    $body    = "Имя: $name\nТелефон: $phone\n\nСообщение:\n$message";
    
    if (wp_mail($to, $subject, $body)) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Заявка отправлена!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка отправки'));
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');

// Customizer
function akpp_kurgan_customize_register($wp_customize) {
    $wp_customize->add_section('akpp_contact', array(
        'title'    => 'Контактная информация',
        'priority' => 30,
    ));
    
    $fields = array(
        'phone_1' => array('label' => 'Телефон 1', 'default' => '+7 (963) 866-99-96'),
        'phone_2' => array('label' => 'Телефон 2', 'default' => '+7 (963) 866-99-96'),
        'telegram' => array('label' => 'Telegram', 'default' => '@akppkgn'),
        'address' => array('label' => 'Адрес', 'default' => 'г. Курган, ул. Бурова-Петрова, 121'),
    );
    
    foreach ($fields as $key => $field) {
        $wp_customize->add_setting($key, array(
            'default'           => $field['default'],
            'sanitize_callback' => 'sanitize_text_field',
        ));
        $wp_customize->add_control($key, array(
            'label'   => $field['label'],
            'section' => 'akpp_contact',
            'type'    => 'text',
        ));
    }
}
add_action('customize_register', 'akpp_kurgan_customize_register');

// ============================================
// ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ CRM СИСТЕМЫ
// ============================================
if (is_admin()) {
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm.php';
}
```

---

## 📄 6. `assets/js/main.js`

```javascript
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Mobile menu
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-toggle');
    const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
    
    if (menuBtn && mobileMenu) {
        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('active');
            this.classList.toggle('active');
        });
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                mobileMenu.classList.remove('active');
                menuBtn.classList.remove('active');
            });
        });
    }
    
    // Smooth scroll
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
        anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            if (href === '#') return;
            
            e.preventDefault();
            const target = document.querySelector(href);
            if (target) {
                target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Contact form
    const contactForm = document.getElementById('contact-form');
    if (contactForm) {
        contactForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const formData = new FormData(this);
            const messageDiv = document.getElementById('form-message');
            
            fetch(akppKurgan.ajaxUrl, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#00ff88';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message;
                    contactForm.reset();
                } else {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message || 'Ошибка';
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                messageDiv.textContent = 'Ошибка соединения';
            });
        });
    }
});
```

## 📄 3. `index.php`

```php
<?php get_header(); ?>

<section class="hero" id="home">
    <div class="container">
        <div class="hero-content">
            <h1 class="hero-title">
                <span class="highlight">Ремонт АКПП</span><br>
                Все марки авто в Кургане
            </h1>
            <p class="hero-description">
                Опыт 11 лет. Ремонт АКПП Toyota, Lexus, Mazda, Ford, Hyundai, Kia, Nissan, Mitsubishi, Renault, BMW, VAG. VIN-декодер, каталоги Amayama.
```

## 📄 4. `functions.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

function akpp_kurgan_setup() {
    add_theme_support('automatic-feed-links');
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
    add_theme_support('html5', array('search-form', 'comment-form', 'comment-list', 'gallery', 'caption', 'style', 'script'));
    add_theme_support('custom-logo', array('height' => 60, 'width' => 200, 'flex-height' => true, 'flex-width' => true));
    
    register_nav_menus(array(
        'primary' => 'Главное меню',
        'footer'  => 'Меню в подвале',
    ));
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'akpp_kurgan_setup');

function akpp_kurgan_scripts() {
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'));
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-kurgan-fonts', 'https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap', array(), null);
    
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-kurgan-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array(), wp_get_theme()->get('Version'), true);
    wp_localize_script('akpp-kurgan-main', 'akppKurgan', array(
        'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
        'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_kurgan_nonce'),
    ));
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_kurgan_scripts');

function akpp_fallback_menu() {
    echo '<ul>';
    echo '<li><a href="#services">Услуги</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#pricing">Цены</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#about">О нас</a></li>';
    echo '<li><a href="#contacts">Контакты</a></li>';
    echo '</ul>';
}

function akpp_get_option($key, $default = '') {
    return get_theme_mod($key, $default);
}

function akpp_kurgan_contact_form() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_kurgan_nonce', 'nonce');
    
    $name    = sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? '');
    $phone   = sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? '');
    $message = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['message'] ?? '');
    
    if (empty($name) || empty($phone)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
    }
    
    $to      = get_option('admin_email');
    $subject = 'Новая заявка с сайта АКПП Курган';
    $body    = "Имя: $name\nТелефон: $phone\n\nСообщение:\n$message";
    
    if (wp_mail($to, $subject, $body)) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Заявка отправлена!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка отправки'));
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_contact_form', 'akpp_kurgan_contact_form');

function akpp_kurgan_customize_register($wp_customize) {
    $wp_customize->add_section('akpp_contact', array(
        'title'    => 'Контактная информация',
        'priority' => 30,
    ));
    
    $fields = array(
        'phone_1' => array('label' => 'Телефон 1', 'default' => '+7 (963) 866-99-96'),
        'phone_2' => array('label' => 'Телефон 2', 'default' => '+7 (963) 866-99-96'),
        'telegram' => array('label' => 'Telegram', 'default' => '@akppkgn'),
        'address' => array('label' => 'Адрес', 'default' => 'г. Курган, ул. Бурова-Петрова, 121'),
    );
    
    foreach ($fields as $key => $field) {
        $wp_customize->add_setting($key, array(
            'default'           => $field['default'],
            'sanitize_callback' => 'sanitize_text_field',
        ));
        $wp_customize->add_control($key, array(
            'label'   => $field['label'],
            'section' => 'akpp_contact',
            'type'    => 'text',
        ));
    }
}
add_action('customize_register', 'akpp_kurgan_customize_register');

// Подключение CRM системы
if (is_admin()) {
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/config.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/database.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/vin-decoder.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/amayama-api.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/transakpp-api.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/vehicles-db.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/transmissions-db.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/admin-pages.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/ajax-handlers.php';
}
```

---

## 📄 5. `assets/js/main.js`

```javascript
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const menuBtn = document.getElementById('mobile-menu-toggle');
    const mobileMenu = document.getElementById('mobile-menu');
    
    if (menuBtn && mobileMenu) {
        menuBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
            mobileMenu.classList.toggle('active');
            this.classList.toggle('active');
        });
        
        document.querySelectorAll('.mobile-nav a').forEach(link => {
            link.addEventListener('click', () => {
                mobileMenu.classList.remove('active');
                menuBtn.classList.remove('active');
            });
        });
    }
    
    document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(anchor => {
        anchor.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            if (href === '#') return;
            
            e.preventDefault();
            const target = document.querySelector(href);
            if (target) {
                target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
            }
        });
    });
    
    const contactForm = document.getElementById('contact-form');
    if (contactForm) {
        contactForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            
            const formData = new FormData(this);
            const messageDiv = document.getElementById('form-message');
            
            fetch(akppKurgan.ajaxUrl, {
                method: 'POST',
                body: formData
            })
            .then(response => response.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#00ff88';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message;
                    contactForm.reset();
                } else {
                    messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                    messageDiv.textContent = data.data.message || 'Ошибка';
                }
            })
            .catch(error => {
                messageDiv.style.color = '#ff6b6b';
                messageDiv.textContent = 'Ошибка соединения';
            });
        });
    }
});
```

## 📄 7. `inc/crm/database.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Database {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'create_tables'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'populate_initial_data'));
    }
    
    public function create_tables() {
        global $wpdb;
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql_deals = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            client_name VARCHAR(255),
            client_phone VARCHAR(50),
            client_vin VARCHAR(17),
            client_body_number VARCHAR(50),
            client_plate VARCHAR(20),
            car_brand VARCHAR(50),
            car_model VARCHAR(100),
            car_year INT,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50),
            employee_id INT,
            problem_description TEXT,
            parts_cost DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
            employee_payment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
            deal_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
            status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',
            received_date DATETIME,
            completed_date DATETIME,
            notes TEXT,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY status (status),
            KEY client_vin (client_vin)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        $sql_employees = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            position VARCHAR(100),
            phone VARCHAR(50),
            salary_type ENUM('percent', 'fixed') DEFAULT 'percent',
            salary_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.00,
            fixed_salary DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
            is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        $sql_vehicles = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            brand VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            model VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            year_from INT,
            year_to INT,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50),
            engine VARCHAR(100),
            drive_type VARCHAR(20),
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100),
            body_number VARCHAR(50),
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY unique_vehicle (brand, model, year_from, transmission_code),
            KEY brand (brand),
            KEY model (model),
            KEY transmission_code (transmission_code)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        $sql_transmissions = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
            name VARCHAR(255),
            manufacturer VARCHAR(100),
            type VARCHAR(50),
            gears INT,
            description TEXT,
            repair_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100),
            transakpp_url VARCHAR(500),
            manual_url VARCHAR(500),
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY code (code)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql_deals);
        dbDelta($sql_employees);
        dbDelta($sql_vehicles);
        dbDelta($sql_transmissions);
    }
    
    public function populate_initial_data() {
        $check = get_option('akpp_db_populated_v7', false);
        if ($check) return;
        
        $this->insert_employees();
        
        update_option('akpp_db_populated_v7', true);
    }
    
    private function insert_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $employees = array(
            array('Иванов Иван', 'Мастер АКПП', '+79638669996', 'percent', 10.00, 0),
            array('Петров Петр', 'Мастер АКПП', '+79638669997', 'percent', 10.00, 0),
        );
        
        foreach ($employees as $emp) {
            $wpdb->insert(
                $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees',
                array(
                    'name' => $emp[0],
                    'position' => $emp[1],
                    'phone' => $emp[2],
                    'salary_type' => $emp[3],
                    'salary_percent' => $emp[4],
                    'fixed_salary' => $emp[5],
                )
            );
        }
    }
}

new AKPP_Database();
```

## 📄 8. `inc/crm/vin-decoder.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_VIN_Decoder {
    
    private $nhtsa_api = 'https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/api/vehicles/DecodeVin/';
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_vin', array($this, 'decode_vin'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_body_number', array($this, 'decode_body_number'));
    }
    
    public function decode_vin() {
        $vin = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['vin'] ?? ''));
        
        if (strlen($vin) !== 17) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN должен содержать 17 символов'));
        }
        
        $response = wp_remote_get($this->nhtsa_api . $vin . '/json');
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка подключения к API'));
        }
        
        $body = wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
        $data = json_decode($body, true);
        
        if (empty($data['Results'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN не найден в базе'));
        }
        
        $result = array();
        foreach ($data['Results'] as $item) {
            $result[$item['Variable']] = $item['Value'];
        }
        
        $transmission = $this->find_transmission_by_vehicle(
            $result['Make'] ?? '',
            $result['Model'] ?? '',
            $result['Model Year'] ?? date('Y')
        );
        
        $decoded = array(
            'vin' => $vin,
            'make' => $result['Make'] ?? '',
            'model' => $result['Model'] ?? '',
            'year' => $result['Model Year'] ?? '',
            'engine' => ($result['Engine Configuration'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($result['Displacement (L)'] ?? '') . 'L',
            'cylinders' => $result['Cylinders'] ?? '',
            'drive_type' => $result['Drive Type'] ?? '',
            'transmission' => $result['Transmission Style'] ?? '',
            'body_class' => $result['Body Class'] ?? '',
            'plant_country' => $result['Plant Country'] ?? '',
            'suggested_transmission' => $transmission,
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success($decoded);
    }
    
    public function decode_body_number() {
        $body_number = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['body_number'] ?? ''));
        
        if (empty($body_number)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите номер кузова'));
        }
        
        if (preg_match('/^([A-Z]{3})(\d{2})[-]?([A-Z0-9]+)$/', $body_number, $matches)) {
            $model_code = $matches[1] . $matches[2];
            $spec = $matches[3];
            
            $brand_map = array(
                'UZZ' => 'Lexus', 'JZZ' => 'Toyota', 'GZZ' => 'Toyota',
                'JZS' => 'Toyota', 'UZX' => 'Lexus', 'JZX' => 'Toyota',
                'GX' => 'Lexus', 'UZ' => 'Lexus', 'JZ' => 'Toyota',
            );
            
            $brand = 'Toyota';
            foreach ($brand_map as $prefix => $b) {
                if (strpos($model_code, $prefix) === 0) {
                    $brand = $b;
                    break;
                }
            }
            
            $model = $this->find_model_by_code($model_code);
            $transmission = $this->find_transmission_by_vehicle($brand, $model, date('Y'));
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'body_number' => $body_number,
                'model_code' => $model_code,
                'specification' => $spec,
                'brand' => $brand,
                'model' => $model,
                'suggested_transmission' => $transmission,
            ));
        }
        
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не удалось расшифровать номер кузова'));
    }
    
    private function find_transmission_by_vehicle($brand, $model, $year) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $trans = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT transmission_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles 
             WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from <= %d 
             AND (year_to >= %d OR year_to IS NULL OR year_to = 0)
             LIMIT 1",
            $brand, $model, $year, $year
        ));
        
        return $trans ?: '';
    }
    
    private function find_model_by_code($code) {
        $models = array(
            'UZZ30' => 'Soarer', 'UZZ31' => 'Soarer', 'UZZ32' => 'Soarer',
            'JZZ30' => 'Supra', 'JZZ31' => 'Supra',
            'JZX90' => 'Mark II', 'JZX100' => 'Mark II', 'JZX110' => 'Mark II',
            'GX71' => 'Mark II', 'GX81' => 'Mark II',
            'UZS161' => 'Crown', 'UZS186' => 'Crown',
        );
        
        return $models[$code] ?? 'Unknown';
    }
}

new AKPP_VIN_Decoder();
```

## 📄 9. `inc/crm/amayama-api.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Amayama_API {
    
    private $base_url = 'https://www.amayama.com';
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_search', array($this, 'search'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_get_catalog', array($this, 'get_catalog'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_get_parts', array($this, 'get_parts'));
    }
    
    public function search() {
        $query = sanitize_text_field($_POST['query'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($query)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите поисковый запрос'));
        }
        
        $url = $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode($query);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'url' => $url,
            'message' => 'Поиск в Amayama'
        ));
    }
    
    public function get_catalog() {
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        $model = sanitize_text_field($_POST['model'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand) || empty($model)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Укажите марку и модель'));
        }
        
        $brand_slug = strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $brand));
        $model_slug = strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $model));
        
        $url = $this->base_url . "/ru/catalog/{$brand_slug}/{$model_slug}/";
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'url' => $url,
            'message' => 'Каталог открыт'
        ));
    }
    
    public function get_parts() {
        $transmission_code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? '');
        
        $parts_db = array(
            'A340E' => array(
                'filter' => '35330-30060',
                'pan_gasket' => '35168-30010',
                'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30520-OHK',
                'input_seal' => '90311-38049',
                'output_seal' => '90311-38050',
            ),
            'A650E' => array(
                'filter' => '35330-30120',
                'pan_gasket' => '35168-30050',
                'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30650-OHK',
                'input_seal' => '90311-38060',
                'output_seal' => '90311-38061',
            ),
            'U660E' => array(
                'filter' => '35330-30150',
                'pan_gasket' => '35168-30080',
                'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30820-OHK',
            ),
        );
        
        $oem = $parts_db[$transmission_code] ?? array();
        
        $parts = array(
            'filters' => array(
                'name' => 'Масляные фильтры',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Фильтр основной', 'oem' => $oem['filter'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-FILTER"),
                    array('name' => 'Фильтр дополнительный', 'oem' => $oem['filter_sub'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-FILTER-SUB"),
                ),
            ),
            'gaskets' => array(
                'name' => 'Прокладки и сальники',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Прокладка поддона', 'oem' => $oem['pan_gasket'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-GASKET"),
                    array('name' => 'Сальник первичного вала', 'oem' => $oem['input_seal'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-SEAL-IN"),
                    array('name' => 'Сальник вторичного вала', 'oem' => $oem['output_seal'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-SEAL-OUT"),
                    array('name' => 'Overhaul Kit (полный)', 'oem' => $oem['overhaul_kit'] ?? "{$transmission_code}-OHK"),
                ),
            ),
            'frictions' => array(
                'name' => 'Фрикционы',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион C1', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-C1"),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион C2', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-C2"),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион B1', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-B1"),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион B2', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-B2"),
                ),
            ),
            'solenoids' => array(
                'name' => 'Соленоиды',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Shift A', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-SOL-A"),
                    array('name' => 'Shift B', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-SOL-B"),
                    array('name' => 'Lock-up', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-SOL-LU"),
                    array('name' => 'Line Pressure', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-SOL-LP"),
                ),
            ),
            'torque_converter' => array(
                'name' => 'Гидротрансформатор',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'ГДТ в сборе', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-TC"),
                    array('name' => 'Ремкомплект ГДТ', 'oem' => "{$transmission_code}-TC-KIT"),
                ),
            ),
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success($parts);
    }
}

new AKPP_Amayama_API();
```

## 📄 10. `inc/crm/transakpp-api.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_TransAKPP_API {
    
    private $base_url = 'https://www.transakpp.ru';
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_transmission_info', array($this, 'get_info'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_manual', array($this, 'get_manual'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_schemes', array($this, 'get_schemes'));
    }
    
    public function get_info() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['code'] ?? '');
        
        $transmission = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions WHERE code = %s",
            $code
        ));
        
        if ($transmission) {
            wp_send_json_success($transmission);
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'АКПП не найдена'));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_manual() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['code'] ?? '');
        
        $transmission = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT manual_url FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions WHERE code = %s",
            $code
        ));
        
        if ($transmission && $transmission->manual_url) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('url' => $transmission->manual_url));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Мануал не найден'));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_schemes() {
        $code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['code'] ?? '');
        
        $schemes = array(
            'exploded' => array(
                'title' => 'Взрыв-схема',
                'url' => $this->base_url . "/schemas/{$code}/exploded",
            ),
            'hydraulic' => array(
                'title' => 'Гидравлическая схема',
                'url' => $this->base_url . "/schemas/{$code}/hydraulic",
            ),
            'electrical' => array(
                'title' => 'Электрическая схема',
                'url' => $this->base_url . "/schemas/{$code}/electrical",
            ),
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success($schemes);
    }
}

new AKPP_TransAKPP_API();
```

```php
class AKPP_Vehicles_DB {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'populate_data'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_add_vehicle', array($this, 'add_vehicle'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_edit_vehicle', array($this, 'edit_vehicle'));

            array('BMW', 'X5', 2013, 2018, 'GA8HP70Z', '3.0L N55', 'AWD'),
            array('BMW', 'X5', 2018, 2026, 'GA8HP75Z', '3.0L B58', 'AWD'),
            array('BMW', '3 Series', 1998, 2005, 'GM5L40E', '2.5L M54', 'RWD'),
            array('BMW', '3 Series', 2005, 2012, 'GA6HP26Z', '3.0L N52', 'RWD'),
            array('BMW', '3 Series', 2012, 2019, 'GA8HP45Z', '2.0L N20', 'RWD'),
            array('BMW', '3 Series', 2019, 2026, 'GA8HP50Z', '2.0L B48', 'RWD'),
            
            // VAG
            array('Volkswagen', 'Tiguan', 2007, 2016, '09G', '2.0L TSI', 'AWD'),
            array('Volkswagen', 'Tiguan', 2016, 2026, 'DQ381', '2.0L TSI', 'AWD'),
            array('Volkswagen', 'Passat', 2005, 2010, '09G', '2.0L TSI', 'FWD'),
            array('Volkswagen', 'Passat', 2010, 2015, 'DQ250', '2.0L TSI', 'FWD'),
            array('Volkswagen', 'Passat', 2015, 2026, 'DQ381', '2.0L TSI', 'FWD'),
            array('Audi', 'Q7', 2006, 2015, '09D', '3.6L FSI', 'AWD'),
            array('Audi', 'Q7', 2015, 2026, '0C8', '3.0L TFSI', 'AWD'),
            array('Audi', 'Q5', 2008, 2017, '0B5', '2.0L TFSI', 'AWD'),
            array('Audi', 'Q5', 2017, 2026, 'DL382', '2.0L TFSI', 'AWD'),
        );
        
        foreach ($vehicles as $v) {
            $wpdb->insert(
                $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles',
                array(
                    'brand' => $v[0],
                    'model' => $v[1],
                    'year_from' => $v[2],
                    'year_to' => $v[3],
                    'transmission_code' => $v[4],
                    'engine' => $v[5],
                    'drive_type' => $v[6],
                    'amayama_code' => '',
                    'body_number' => '',
                )
            );
        }
    }
    
    public function add_vehicle() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $data = array(
            'brand' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand']),
            'model' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['model']),
            'year_from' => intval($_POST['year_from']),
            'year_to' => intval($_POST['year_to']),
            'transmission_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code']),
            'engine' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['engine']),
            'drive_type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['drive_type']),
        );
        
        $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles', $data);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Автомобиль добавлен', 'id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
    }
    
    public function edit_vehicle() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $id = intval($_POST['id']);
        
        $data = array(
            'brand' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand']),
            'model' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['model']),
            'year_from' => intval($_POST['year_from']),
            'year_to' => intval($_POST['year_to']),
            'transmission_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code']),
            'engine' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['engine']),
            'drive_type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['drive_type']),
        );
        
        $wpdb->update($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles', $data, array('id' => $id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Автомобиль обновлен'));
    }
    
    public function delete_vehicle() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $id = intval($_POST['id']);
        
        $wpdb->delete($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles', array('id' => $id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Автомобиль удален'));
    }
}

new AKPP_Vehicles_DB();
```

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Transmissions_DB {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'populate_data'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_add_transmission', array($this, 'add_transmission'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_edit_transmission', array($this, 'edit_transmission'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_transmission', array($this, 'delete_transmission'));
    }
    
    public function populate_data() {
        $check = get_option('akpp_transmissions_populated_v7', false);
        if ($check) return;
        
        $this->insert_transmissions();
        
        update_option('akpp_transmissions_populated_v7', true);
    }
    
    private function insert_transmissions() {

        );
        
        foreach ($transmissions as $trans) {
            $wpdb->insert(
                $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions',
                array(
                    'code' => $trans[0],
                    'name' => $trans[1],
                    'manufacturer' => $trans[2],
                    'type' => $trans[3],
                    'gears' => $trans[4],
                    'description' => $trans[5],
                    'repair_price' => $trans[6],
                    'amayama_code' => $trans[7],
                    'transakpp_url' => $trans[8],
                    'manual_url' => $trans[9],
                )
            );
        }
    }
    
    public function add_transmission() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $data = array(
            'code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['code']),
            'name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['name']),
            'manufacturer' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['manufacturer']),
            'type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['type']),
            'gears' => intval($_POST['gears']),
            'description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['description']),
            'repair_price' => floatval($_POST['repair_price']),
            'amayama_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['amayama_code']),
            'transakpp_url' => esc_url_raw($_POST['transakpp_url']),
            'manual_url' => esc_url_raw($_POST['manual_url']),
        );
        
        $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions', $data);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'АКПП добавлена', 'id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
    }
    
    public function edit_transmission() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $id = intval($_POST['id']);
        
        $data = array(
            'code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['code']),
            'name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['name']),
            'manufacturer' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['manufacturer']),
            'type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['type']),
            'gears' => intval($_POST['gears']),
            'description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['description']),
            'repair_price' => floatval($_POST['repair_price']),
            'amayama_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['amayama_code']),
            'transakpp_url' => esc_url_raw($_POST['transakpp_url']),
            'manual_url' => esc_url_raw($_POST['manual_url']),
        );
        
        $wpdb->update($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions', $data, array('id' => $id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'АКПП обновлена'));
    }
    
    public function delete_transmission() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $id = intval($_POST['id']);
        
        $wpdb->delete($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions', array('id' => $id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'АКПП удалена'));
    }
}
```

## 📄 13. `inc/crm/admin-pages.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Admin_Pages {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'create_menu'));
        add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_assets'));
    }
    
    public function create_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'CRM АКПП',
            'CRM АКПП',
            'manage_options',
            'akpp-crm',
            array($this, 'dashboard_page'),
            'dashicons-dashboard',
            3
        );
        
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Панель', '📊 Панель', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'dashboard_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сделки', '📋 Сделки', 'manage_options', 'akpp-deals', array($this, 'deals_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Новая сделка', '➕ Новая', 'manage_options', 'akpp-new-deal', array($this, 'new_deal_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сотрудники', '👥 Сотрудники', 'manage_options', 'akpp-employees', array($this, 'employees_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Финансы', '💰 Финансы', 'manage_options', 'akpp-finance', array($this, 'finance_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'База АКПП', '⚙️ АКПП', 'manage_options', 'akpp-transmissions', array($this, 'transmissions_page'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'База Авто', '🚗 Авто', 'manage_options', 'akpp-vehicles', array($this, 'vehicles_page'));
    }
    
    public function enqueue_assets($hook) {
        if (strpos($hook, 'akpp') === false) return;
        
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm-style', get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/css/crm.css', array(), '7.0.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('akpp-crm-script', get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/js/crm.js', array('jquery'), '7.0.0', true);
        
        wp_localize_script('akpp-crm-script', 'akppCrm', array(
            'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_crm_nonce'),
        ));
    }
    
    public function dashboard_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $stats = array(
            'total_deals' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals"),
            'active_deals' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status IN ('new', 'diagnostic', 'in_work')"),
            'completed_deals' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'"),
            'total_revenue' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
            'total_parts_cost' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
            'total_salary' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
        );
        
        $stats['balance'] = $stats['total_revenue'] - $stats['total_parts_cost'] - $stats['total_salary'];
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/dashboard.php';
    }
    
    public function deals_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deals-list.php';
    }
    
    public function new_deal_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees WHERE is_active = 1");
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT DISTINCT code, name FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code");
        $brands = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php';
    }
    
    public function employees_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees ORDER BY name");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/employees.php';
    }
    
    public function finance_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $finance = array(
            'revenue' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
            'parts_cost' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
            'salary_cost' => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0,
            'balance' => 0,
        );
        
        $finance['balance'] = $finance['revenue'] - $finance['parts_cost'] - $finance['salary_cost'];
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/finance.php';
    }
    
    public function transmissions_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/transmissions.php';
    }
    
    public function vehicles_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        $vehicles = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand, model, year_from DESC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/vehicles.php';
    }
}

new AKPP_Admin_Pages();
```

## 📄 14. `inc/crm/ajax-handlers.php`

```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Ajax_Handlers {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_deal', array($this, 'save_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deal', array($this, 'get_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_deal', array($this, 'delete_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_models', array($this, 'get_models'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_employee', array($this, 'save_employee'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_employee', array($this, 'delete_employee'));
    }
    
    public function save_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'client_name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_name'] ?? ''),
            'client_phone' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_phone'] ?? ''),
            'client_vin' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_vin'] ?? ''),
            'client_body_number' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_body_number'] ?? ''),
            'client_plate' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_plate'] ?? ''),
            'car_brand' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_brand'] ?? ''),
            'car_model' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_model'] ?? ''),
            'car_year' => intval($_POST['car_year'] ?? 0),
            'transmission_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? ''),
            'employee_id' => intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0),
            'problem_description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['problem_description'] ?? ''),
            'parts_cost' => floatval($_POST['parts_cost'] ?? 0),
            'employee_payment' => floatval($_POST['employee_payment'] ?? 0),
            'deal_price' => floatval($_POST['deal_price'] ?? 0),
            'status' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? 'new'),
            'received_date' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['received_date'] ?? ''),
            'completed_date' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['completed_date'] ?? ''),
            'notes' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['notes'] ?? ''),
        );
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $deal_id));
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка обновлена', 'deal_id' => $deal_id));
        } else {
            $data['created_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка создана', 'deal_id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d",
            $deal_id
        ));
        
        wp_send_json_success($deal);
    }
    
    public function delete_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $wpdb->delete($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals', array('id' => $deal_id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка удалена'));
    }
    
    public function get_models() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        
        $models = $wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT DISTINCT model FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles WHERE brand = %s ORDER BY model",
            $brand
        ));
        
        wp_send_json_success($models);
    }
    
    public function save_employee() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        
        $employee_id = intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? ''),
            'position' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['position'] ?? ''),
            'phone' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? ''),
            'salary_type' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['salary_type'] ?? 'percent'),
            'salary_percent' => floatval($_POST['salary_percent'] ?? 0),
            'fixed_salary' => floatval($_POST['fixed_salary'] ?? 0),
            'is_active' => intval($_POST['is_active'] ?? 1),
        );
        
        if ($employee_id > 0) {
            $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $employee_id));
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник обновлен'));
        } else {
            $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник добавлен', 'id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
        }
    }
    
    public function delete_employee() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        $employee_id = intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $wpdb->delete($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees', array('id' => $employee_id));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник удален'));
    }
}

new AKPP_Ajax_Handlers();
```

## 📄 16. `inc/crm/assets/js/crm.js`

```javascript
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    // Mobile menu toggle
    $('#mobile-menu-toggle').on('click', function() {
        $('#mobile-menu').toggleClass('active');
        $(this).toggleClass('active');
    });
    
    // Smooth scroll
    $('a[href^="#"]').on('click', function(e) {
        const href = $(this).attr('href');
        if (href === '#') return;
        
        e.preventDefault();
        const target = $(href);
        if (target.length) {
            $('html, body').animate({
                scrollTop: target.offset().top - 80
            }, 500);
        }
    });
    
    // VIN decoder
    $('#decode-vin-btn').on('click', function() {
        const vin = $('#client-vin').val();
        if (vin.length !== 17) {
            alert('VIN должен содержать 17 символов');
            return;
        }
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
            action: 'akpp_decode_vin',
            vin: vin,
            nonce: akppCrm.nonce
        }, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                const data = response.data;
                $('#vin-decode-result').show().html(`
                    <h4>✅ VIN расшифрован:</h4>
                    <p><strong>Марка:</strong> ${data.make}</p>
                    <p><strong>Модель:</strong> ${data.model}</p>
                    <p><strong>Год:</strong> ${data.year}</p>
                    <p><strong>Двигатель:</strong> ${data.engine}</p>
                    <p><strong>Привод:</strong> ${data.drive_type}</p>
                    <p><strong>АКПП:</strong> ${data.suggested_transmission || 'Не определена'}</p>
                `);
                
                $('#car-year').val(data.year);
                if (data.suggested_transmission) {
                    $('#transmission-code').val(data.suggested_transmission);
                }
            } else {
                $('#vin-decode-result').show().html(`<p style="color:#ff6b6b;">❌ ${response.data.message}</p>`);
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Load models by brand
    $('#car-brand').on('change', function() {
        const brand = $(this).val();
        const modelSelect = $('#car-model');
        
        modelSelect.html('<option value="">Загрузка...</option>');
        
        if (brand) {
            $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                action: 'akpp_get_models',
                brand: brand,
                nonce: akppCrm.nonce
            }, function(response) {
                if (response.success) {
                    let options = '<option value="">-- Выберите модель --</option>';
                    response.data.forEach(model => {
                        options += `<option value="${model}">${model}</option>`;
                    });
                    modelSelect.html(options);
                }
            });
        }
    });
    
    // Auto-calculate employee payment
    $('#employee-id, #deal-price').on('change input', function() {
        const employeeSelect = $('#employee-id');
        const selected = employeeSelect.find(':selected');
        const percent = parseFloat(selected.data('percent')) || 0;
        const dealPrice = parseFloat($('#deal-price').val()) || 0;
        
        if (percent > 0 && dealPrice > 0) {
            const payment = dealPrice * percent / 100;
            $('#employee-payment').val(payment.toFixed(2));
        }
    });
    
    // Save deal
    $('#akpp-deal-form').on('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const formData = $(this).serialize();
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, formData + '&action=akpp_save_deal&nonce=' + akppCrm.nonce, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                $('#form-response').css('color', '#00ff88').text('✅ ' + response.data.message);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    window.location.href = '<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-deals'); ?>';
                }, 1500);
            } else {
                $('#form-response').css('color', '#ff6b6b').text('❌ Ошибка сохранения');
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Delete deal
    $('.delete-deal').on('click', function() {
        if (!confirm('Удалить сделку?')) return;
        
        const dealId = $(this).data('id');
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
            action: 'akpp_delete_deal',
            deal_id: dealId,
            nonce: akppCrm.nonce
        }, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                location.reload();
            }
        });
    });
});
```

```php
<?php if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit; ?>

            <div class="stat-icon">✅</div>

            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="akpp-stat-card expenses">
            <div class="stat-icon">💸</div>
            <div class="stat-content">
                <h3>Расходы</h3>
                <p class="stat-number"><?php echo number_format($stats['total_parts_cost'] + $stats['total_salary'], 0, ',', ' '); ?> ₽</p>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="akpp-stat-card balance <?php echo $stats['balance'] >= 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'; ?>">
            <div class="stat-icon"><?php echo $stats['balance'] >= 0 ? '📈' : '📉'; ?></div>
            <div class="stat-content">
                <h3>Баланс</h3>
                <p class="stat-number"><?php echo number_format($stats['balance'], 0, ',', ' '); ?> ₽</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div style="margin-top: 40px;">
        <h2>Быстрые действия</h2>
        <div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
            <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-new-deal'); ?>" class="button button-primary button-hero">➕ Новая сделка</a>
            <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-deals'); ?>" class="button button-hero">📋 Все сделки</a>
            <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-finance'); ?>" class="button button-hero">💰 Финансы</a>
            <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-employees'); ?>" class="button button-hero">👥 Сотрудники</a>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

```php
            <div class="form-row">
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Статус</label>
                    <select name="status">
                        <option value="new">🆕 Новая</option>
                        <option value="diagnostic">🔍 Диагностика</option>
                        <option value="negotiation">💬 Согласование</option>
                        <option value="in_work">🔧 В работе</option>
                        <option value="completed">✅ Завершено</option>
                        <option value="rejected">❌ Отказ</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Дата приема</label>

                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label>Дата выдачи</label>
                    <input type="datetime-local" name="completed_date">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="form-group">
                <label>Заметки</label>
                <textarea name="notes" rows="2"></textarea>
            </div>
        </div>

            <button type="submit" class="button button-primary button-hero">💾 Сохранить сделку</button>
            <div id="form-response"></div>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>
```

## 📄 19. `inc/crm/templates/deals-list.php`

```php
<?php if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit; ?>
<div class="wrap akpp-crm-dashboard">
    <h1>📋 Все сделки</h1>
    
    <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-new-deal'); ?>" class="button button-primary">➕ Новая сделка</a>
    
    <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped" style="margin-top:20px;">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>Клиент</th>
                <th>Телефон</th>
                <th>VIN</th>
                <th>Авто</th>
                <th>АКПП</th>
                <th>Статус</th>
                <th>Сумма</th>
                <th>Дата</th>
                <th>Действия</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            <?php if (!empty($deals)) : foreach ($deals as $deal) : ?>
            <tr>
                <td>#<?php echo $deal->id; ?></td>
                <td><strong><?php echo esc_html($deal->client_name); ?></strong></td>
                <td><a href="tel:<?php echo esc_attr($deal->client_phone); ?>"><?php echo esc_html($deal->client_phone); ?></a></td>
                <td><code><?php echo esc_html($deal->client_vin); ?></code></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($deal->car_brand . ' ' . $deal->car_model); ?></td>
                <td><code><?php echo esc_html($deal->transmission_code); ?></code></td>
                <td>
                    <span class="status-badge status-<?php echo esc_attr($deal->status); ?>">
                        <?php 
                        $statuses = array(
                            'new' => '🆕 Новая',
                            'diagnostic' => '🔍 Диагностика',
                            'negotiation' => '💬 Согласование',
                            'in_work' => '🔧 В работе',
                            'completed' => '✅ Завершено',
                            'rejected' => '❌ Отказ'
                        );
                        echo $statuses[$deal->status] ?? $deal->status;
                        ?>
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td><strong><?php echo number_format($deal->deal_price, 0, ',', ' '); ?> ₽</strong></td>
                <td><?php echo date('d.m.Y', strtotime($deal->created_at)); ?></td>
                <td>
                    <a href="<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-new-deal&id=' . $deal->id); ?>" class="button">✏️</a>
                    <button class="button delete-deal" data-id="<?php echo $deal->id; ?>">🗑️</button>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; else : ?>
            <tr><td colspan="10">Сделок пока нет</td></tr>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
```

```php
<?php if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit; ?>
<div class="wrap akpp-crm-dashboard">
    <h1>👥 Сотрудники</h1>
    
    <button id="add-employee-btn" class="button button-primary">➕ Добавить сотрудника</button>
    
    <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped" style="margin-top:20px;">
        <thead>
            <tr>
                <th>ID</th>
                <th>ФИО</th>
                <th>Должность</th>
                <th>Телефон</th>
                <th>Тип оплаты</th>
                <th>Ставка</th>
                <th>Статус</th>
                <th>Действия</th>
            </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
            <?php if (!empty($employees)) : foreach ($employees as $emp) : ?>
            <tr>
                <td>#<?php echo $emp->id; ?></td>
                <td><strong><?php echo esc_html($emp->name); ?></strong></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($emp->position); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo esc_html($emp->phone); ?></td>
                <td><?php echo $emp->salary_type === 'percent' ? 'Процент' : 'Фикс'; ?></td>
                <td>
                    <?php 
                    if ($emp->salary_type === 'percent') {
                        echo $emp->salary_percent . '%';
                    } else {
                        echo number_format($emp->fixed_salary, 0, ',', ' ') . ' ₽';
                    }
                    ?>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <span class="status-badge <?php echo $emp->is_active ? 'status-completed' : 'status-rejected'; ?>">
                        <?php echo $emp->is_active ? '✅ Активен' : '❌ Неактивен'; ?>
                    </span>
                </td>
                <td>
                    <button class="button">✏️</button>
                    <button class="button delete-employee" data-id="<?php echo $emp->id; ?>">🗑️</button>
                </td>
            </tr>
            <?php endforeach; else : ?>
            <tr><td colspan="8">Сотрудников нет</td></tr>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </tbody>
    </table>
</div>
```
