```php
                               value="<?php echo $deal ? esc_attr($deal->client_body_number) : ''; ?>" 
                               placeholder="Например: UZZ30-1234567"
                               style="text-transform: uppercase;">
                        <button type="button" id="decode-body-btn" class="akpp-btn akpp-btn-secondary">

                           required 
                           placeholder="Иванов Иван Иванович">
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Телефон *</label>
                    <input type="tel" name="client_phone" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? esc_attr($deal->client_phone) : ''; ?>" 
                           required 
                           placeholder="+7 (963) 866-99-96">
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Гос. номер</label>
                    <input type="text" name="client_plate" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? esc_attr($deal->client_plate) : ''; ?>" 
                           placeholder="А123БВ45"
                           style="text-transform: uppercase;">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Секция: Автомобиль -->
        <div class="akpp-form-section">
            <h2 class="akpp-section-title">🚗 Автомобиль</h2>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-row">
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Марка</label>
                    <select name="car_brand" id="car-brand">
                        <option value="">-- Выберите марку --</option>
                        <?php foreach ($brands as $brand) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($brand); ?>" 
                                    <?php echo ($deal && $deal->car_brand === $brand) ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
                                <?php echo esc_html($brand); ?>
                            </option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Модель</label>
                    <select name="car_model" id="car-model">
                        <option value="">-- Сначала выберите марку --</option>
                        <?php if ($deal && !empty($deal->car_model)) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($deal->car_model); ?>" selected>
                                <?php echo esc_html($deal->car_model); ?>
                            </option>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Год выпуска</label>
                    <input type="number" name="car_year" id="car-year" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? intval($deal->car_year) : ''; ?>" 
                           min="1990" max="2026" 
                           placeholder="2020">
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-row">
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Код АКПП</label>
                    <select name="transmission_code" id="transmission-code">
                        <option value="">-- Выберите или введите --</option>
                        <?php if ($deal && !empty($deal->transmission_code)) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo esc_attr($deal->transmission_code); ?>" selected>
                                <?php echo esc_html($deal->transmission_code); ?>
                            </option>
                        <?php endif; ?>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Сотрудник</label>
                    <select name="employee_id" id="employee-id">
                        <option value="">-- Выберите сотрудника --</option>
                        <?php foreach ($employees as $emp) : ?>
                            <option value="<?php echo $emp->id; ?>" 
                                    data-percent="<?php echo $emp->salary_percent; ?>"
                                    <?php echo ($deal && $deal->employee_id == $emp->id) ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>
                                <?php echo esc_html($emp->name . ' (' . $emp->salary_percent . '%)'); ?>
                            </option>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    </select>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-group">
                <label>Проблема / Симптомы</label>
                <textarea name="problem_description" rows="4" 
                          placeholder="Опишите симптомы: пинается, буксует, не едет, горит ошибка..."><?php echo $deal ? esc_textarea($deal->problem_description) : ''; ?></textarea>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Секция: Финансы -->
        <div class="akpp-form-section">

                    <input type="number" name="parts_cost" id="parts-cost" 
                           step="0.01" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? floatval($deal->parts_cost) : 0; ?>" 
                           placeholder="0.00">
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Выплата сотруднику (₽)</label>
                    <input type="number" name="employee_payment" id="employee-payment" 
                           step="0.01" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? floatval($deal->employee_payment) : 0; ?>" 
                           placeholder="0.00"
                           readonly>
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Итоговая цена (₽)</label>
                    <input type="number" name="deal_price" id="deal-price" 
                           step="0.01" 
                           value="<?php echo $deal ? floatval($deal->deal_price) : 0; ?>" 
                           placeholder="0.00">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Секция: Даты и статус -->
        <div class="akpp-form-section">
            <h2 class="akpp-section-title">📅 Даты и статус</h2>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-row">
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Статус</label>
                    <select name="status">
                        <option value="new" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'new') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>🆕 Новая</option>
                        <option value="diagnostic" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'diagnostic') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>🔍 Диагностика</option>
                        <option value="negotiation" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'negotiation') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>💬 Согласование</option>
                        <option value="in_work" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'in_work') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>🔧 В работе</option>
                        <option value="completed" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'completed') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>✅ Завершено</option>
                        <option value="rejected" <?php echo ($deal && $deal->status === 'rejected') ? 'selected' : ''; ?>>❌ Отказ</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">
                    <label>Дата приема</label>

                           value="<?php echo $deal ? esc_attr($deal->received_date) : ''; ?>">
                </div>
                
                <div class="akpp-form-group">

            <div class="akpp-form-group">

                ← Отмена
            </a>
            <div id="form-response" style="flex: 1;"></div>
        </div>
    </form>
</div>

<script>
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    // Автоматический расчет выплаты сотруднику
    function calculatePayment() {
        const percent = parseFloat($('#employee-id option:selected').data('percent')) || 0;
        const price = parseFloat($('#deal-price').val()) || 0;
        
        if (percent > 0 && price > 0) {
            const payment = (price * percent / 100).toFixed(2);
            $('#employee-payment').val(payment);
        } else {
            $('#employee-payment').val('0.00');
        }
    }
    
    $('#employee-id, #deal-price').on('change input', calculatePayment);
    
    // Загрузка моделей по марке
    $('#car-brand').on('change', function() {
        const brand = $(this).val();
        const select = $('#car-model');
        
        select.html('<option value="">Загрузка...</option>');
        
        if (brand) {
            $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, { 
                action: 'akpp_get_models_by_brand', 
                nonce: akppCrm.nonce, 
                brand: brand 
            }, function(res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    let opts = '<option value="">-- Выберите модель --</option>';
                    res.data.forEach(m => opts += `<option value="${m}">${m}</option>`);
                    select.html(opts);
                } else {
                    select.html('<option value="">Ошибка загрузки</option>');
                }
            });
        } else {
            select.html('<option value="">-- Сначала выберите марку --</option>');
        }
    });
    
    // VIN декодер
    $('#decode-vin-btn').on('click', function() {
        const vin = $('#client-vin').val().trim();
        
        if (vin.length !== 17) {
            alert('VIN должен содержать ровно 17 символов');
            return;
        }
        
        const btn = $(this);
        const originalText = btn.text();
        btn.html('<span class="akpp-loading"></span> Расшифровка...').prop('disabled', true);
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, { 
            action: 'akpp_decode_vin', 
            nonce: akppCrm.nonce, 
            vin: vin 
        }, function(res) {
            btn.text(originalText).prop('disabled', false);
            
            const resultDiv = $('#vin-decode-result');
            
            if (res.success) {
                const d = res.data;
                resultDiv.show().html(`
                    <div class="akpp-vin-result">
                        <h4>✅ VIN успешно расшифрован</h4>
                        <p><strong>Марка:</strong> ${d.make}</p>
                        <p><strong>Модель:</strong> ${d.model}</p>
                        <p><strong>Год:</strong> ${d.year}</p>
                        <p><strong>Двигатель:</strong> ${d.engine}</p>
                        <p><strong>Привод:</strong> ${d.drive_type}</p>
                        <p><strong>Рекомендуемая АКПП:</strong> <code>${d.suggested_transmission}</code> ${d.suggested_transmission_name}</p>
                    </div>
                `);
                
                // Автозаполнение полей
                $('#car-year').val(d.year);
                $('#car-brand').val(d.make).trigger('change');
                
                setTimeout(() => {
                    $('#car-model').val(d.model);
                    
                    // Получаем АКПП по автомобилю
                    $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, { 
                        action: 'akpp_get_transmission_by_vehicle', 
                        nonce: akppCrm.nonce, 
                        brand: d.make, 
                        model: d.model, 
                        year: d.year 
                    }, function(tRes) {
                        if (tRes.success && tRes.data.code) {
                            $('#transmission-code').val(tRes.data.code);
                        }
                    });
                }, 500);
            } else {
                resultDiv.show().html(`
                    <div class="akpp-message akpp-message-error">
                        ❌ ${res.data.message}
                    </div>
                `);
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Декодер номера кузова
    $('#decode-body-btn').on('click', function() {
        const body = $('#client-body').val().trim();
        
        if (!body) {
            alert('Введите номер кузова');
            return;
        }
        
        const btn = $(this);
        const originalText = btn.text();
        btn.html('<span class="akpp-loading"></span>').prop('disabled', true);
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, { 
            action: 'akpp_decode_body_number', 
            nonce: akppCrm.nonce, 
            body_number: body 
        }, function(res) {
            btn.text(originalText).prop('disabled', false);
            
            const resultDiv = $('#vin-decode-result');
            
            if (res.success) {
                const d = res.data;
                resultDiv.show().html(`
                    <div class="akpp-vin-result">
                        <h4>✅ Кузов расшифрован</h4>
                        <p><strong>Марка:</strong> ${d.brand}</p>
                        <p><strong>Модель:</strong> ${d.model}</p>
                        <p><strong>Код кузова:</strong> <code>${d.model_code}</code></p>
                        <p><strong>Рекомендуемая АКПП:</strong> <code>${d.suggested_transmission}</code></p>
                    </div>
                `);
                
                $('#car-brand').val(d.brand).trigger('change');
                setTimeout(() => {
                    $('#car-model').val(d.model);
                    $('#transmission-code').val(d.suggested_transmission);
                }, 500);
            } else {
                resultDiv.show().html(`
                    <div class="akpp-message akpp-message-error">
                        ❌ ${res.data.message}
                    </div>
                `);
            }
        });
    });
    
    // Сохранение сделки
    $('#akpp-deal-form').on('submit', function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        const btn = $(this).find('button[type="submit"]');
        const originalText = btn.text();
        btn.html('<span class="akpp-loading"></span> Сохранение...').prop('disabled', true);
        
        $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, $(this).serialize() + '&action=akpp_save_deal&nonce=' + akppCrm.nonce, function(res) {
            btn.text(originalText).prop('disabled', false);
            
            const responseDiv = $('#form-response');
            
            if (res.success) {
                responseDiv.html(`
                    <div class="akpp-message akpp-message-success">
                        ✅ ${res.data.message}
                    </div>
                `);
                setTimeout(() => {
                    window.location.href = '<?php echo admin_url('admin.php?page=akpp-deals'); ?>';
                }, 1500);
            } else {
                responseDiv.html(`
                    <div class="akpp-message akpp-message-error">
                        ❌ ${res.data.message}
                    </div>
                `);
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>
```

---

## 📄 3. `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php` (ОБНОВИТЬ - добавить подключение нового CSS)

Найдите метод `enqueue_assets` и замените его:

```php
public function enqueue_assets($hook) {
    if (strpos($hook, 'akpp') === false) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Подключаем новый кибер-стиль
    wp_enqueue_style(
        'akpp-crm-admin', 
        get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/css/crm-admin.css', 
        array(), 
        '2.0.0'
    );
    
    wp_enqueue_script(
        'akpp-crm-admin', 
        get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/js/crm.js', 
        array('jquery'), 
        '2.0.0', 
        true
    );
    
    wp_localize_script('akpp-crm-admin', 'akppCrm', array(
        'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
        'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_crm_nonce'),
    ));
}
```

---

## ✅ ЧТО ПОЛУЧИТЕ:

### 🎨 Визуальные улучшения:
- ✅ Градиентный фон с анимацией вращения
- ✅ Неоновые акценты (#00ff88) с свечением
- ✅ Стеклянные карточки с backdrop-filter
- ✅ Плавные анимации при наведении
- ✅ Кастомные модальные окна
- ✅ Loading-анимации при загрузке
- ✅ Адаптивный дизайн для мобильных

### 🚀 Функциональные улучшения:
- ✅ VIN декодер с красивым отображением результатов
- ✅ Автозаполнение полей после расшифровки VIN
- ✅ Автоматический расчет ЗП сотрудника
- ✅ Валидация VIN (17 символов)
- ✅ Обработка ошибок с красивыми сообщениями
- ✅ Защита от двойного клика (disabled кнопка)

### 📱 UX улучшения:
- ✅ Секционная структура формы
- ✅ Иконки для каждой секции
- ✅ Placeholder'ы с примерами
- ✅ Readonly поле для авто-расчета ЗП
- ✅ Плавные переходы между состояниями

---

## 📋 ИНСТРУКЦИЯ ПО УСТАНОВКЕ:

1. **Создайте файл** `inc/crm/assets/css/crm-admin.css` и скопируйте туда CSS код
2. **Замените файл** `inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php` на новый код
3. **Обновите метод** `enqueue_assets` в `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php`
4. **Очистите кеш** браузера (Ctrl+Shift+R)
5. **Откройте** страницу "Новая сделка" в админке

**Готово! Теперь форма выглядит как киберпанк-интерфейс!** 🎉

### USER
тут есть структура, это правильно или добавляем как у тебя

### ASSISTANT
Вижу проблему! У вас **две темы** и структура немного не та. Давайте исправим:

## ❌ Что сейчас не так:

1. **Две темы**: `akpp-kurgan` и `akpp-new` (нужна одна!)
2. **Структура внутри `akpp-new`** неправильная - папки `assets` и `inc` должны быть в корне темы

## ✅ Правильная структура (как должно быть):

```
wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/
├── style.css                    ← Главный файл темы
├── header.php                   ← Шапка
├── footer.php                   ← Подвал
├── index.php                    ← Главная
├── functions.php                ← Функции (подключение CRM)
├── screenshot.png               ← (опционально)
├── assets/                      ← РЕСУРСЫ
│   ├── css/
│   │   ├── crm.css             ← Стили CRM
│   │   └── main.css            ← Стили сайта
│   └── js/
│       ├── crm.js              ← Скрипты CRM
│       └── main.js             ← Скрипты сайта
└── inc/                         ← CRM МОДУЛИ
    └── crm/
        ├── config.php
        ├── database.php
        ├── class-crm-deals.php
        ├── class-crm-employees.php
        ├── class-crm-admin.php
        ├── class-vin-decoder.php
        ├── class-amayama.php
        ├── class-transakpp.php
        ├── class-vehicles.php
        ├── class-transmissions.php
        └── templates/
            ├── dashboard.php
            ├── deals.php
            ├── deal-form.php
            ├── employees.php
            ├── vehicles.php
            └── transmissions.php
```

## 🔧 Что нужно сделать:

**Вариант 1 (рекомендую):** Использовать `akpp-kurgan` как основную тему
1. Удалить тему `akpp-new` 
2. Перенести все файлы CRM в `akpp-kurgan`
3. Активировать тему `akpp-kurgan` в WordPress

**Вариант 2:** Использовать `akpp-new` как основную тему
1. Переместить все файлы из `akpp-new/assets` и `akpp-new/inc` на уровень выше
2. Добавить файлы темы (`style.css`, `functions.php`, `header.php`, `footer.php`, `index.php`)
3. Удалить `akpp-kurgan`

**Какой вариант выбираете?** 1 или 2?

Я подготовлю полную структуру файлов для выбранного варианта.

### USER
проанализируй структуру, что не так

### ASSISTANT

## ❌ ЧЕГО НЕ ХВАТАЕТ:

### 1. **Основные файлы темы WordPress** (ОБЯЗАТЕЛЬНЫЕ!)
```
❌ style.css              ← Без этого WordPress не увидит тему!
❌ functions.php          ← Без этого не работают скрипты/стили
❌ index.php              ← Главный шаблон темы
❌ header.php             ← Шапка сайта
❌ footer.php             ← Подвал сайта
```

### 2. **Что есть (правильно создано):**
```
✅ assets/css/crm.css     (4.0 kb)
✅ assets/css/main.css    (2.2 kb)
✅ assets/js/crm.js       (1.3 kb)
✅ assets/js/main.js      (1.1 kb)
✅ assets/js/admin.js     (526 b)
✅ inc/crm/ (все классы и шаблоны)
```

## 🔧 ЧТО НУЖНО СДЕЛАТЬ:

### Создать 5 основных файлов в корне темы:

**1. `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/style.css`:**
```css
/*
Theme Name: АКПП Курган
Theme URI: https://akpp45.ru
Author: AKPP45 Team
Description: CRM система для сервиса АКПП
Version: 1.0.0
Requires at least: 6.0
Tested up to: 7.0
Requires PHP: 7.4
Text Domain: akpp-kurgan
*/
```

**2. `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/functions.php`:**
```php
<?php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

// Подключение CRM
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/config.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/database.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-employees.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vin-decoder.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-amayama.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transakpp.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vehicles.php';
require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transmissions.php';

// Подключение скриптов и стилей
function akpp_enqueue_assets() {
    // Frontend
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/main.css', array(), '1.0.0');
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array('jquery'), '1.0.0', true);
    
    // Admin (CRM)
    if (is_admin()) {
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/crm.css', array(), '1.0.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/crm.js', array('jquery'), '1.0.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('akpp-crm', 'akppCrm', array(
            'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_crm_nonce'),
        ));
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');
add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');
```

**3. `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/index.php`:**
```php
<?php get_header(); ?>
<main>
    <?php
    if (have_posts()) :
        while (have_posts()) : the_post();
            the_content();
        endwhile;
    endif;
    ?>
</main>
<?php get_footer(); ?>
```

**4. `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/header.php`:**
```php
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html <?php language_attributes(); ?>>
<head>
    <meta charset="<?php bloginfo('charset'); ?>">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <?php wp_head(); ?>
</head>
<body <?php body_class(); ?>>
<header>
    <h1><?php bloginfo('name'); ?></h1>
</header>
```

**5. `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/footer.php`:**
```php
<footer>
    <p>&copy; <?php echo date('Y'); ?> <?php bloginfo('name'); ?></p>
</footer>
<?php wp_footer(); ?>
</body>
</html>
```

## 🔧 ЧТО НУЖНО СДЕЛАТЬ:

### 1. **Создать файлы CRM в `inc/crm/`:**

Создай эти файлы в папке `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/inc/crm/`:

- `config.php`
- `database.php`
- `class-crm-deals.php`
- `class-crm-employees.php`
- `class-crm-admin.php`
- `class-vin-decoder.php`
- `class-amayama.php`
- `class-transakpp.php`
- `class-vehicles.php`
- `class-transmissions.php`
- `assets/css/crm-admin.css` (НОВЫЙ файл с кибер-дизайном)

### 2. **Обновить `functions.php`:**

Замени содержимое `functions.php` на это:

```php
<?php
/**
 * АКПП Курган - Theme Functions
 * Version: 2.0.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

// Theme Setup
function akpp_setup() {
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
    add_theme_support('html5', array('search-form', 'comment-form', 'comment-list', 'gallery', 'caption'));
    
    register_nav_menus(array(
        'primary' => 'Главное меню',
        'footer'  => 'Меню в подвале',
    ));
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'akpp_setup');

// Enqueue Scripts & Styles
function akpp_enqueue_assets() {
    // Frontend
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), array(), '2.0.0');
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/main.css', array(), '2.0.0');
    
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array('jquery'), '2.0.0', true);
    
    // Admin (CRM)
    if (is_admin()) {
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/crm.css', array(), '2.0.0');
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm-admin', get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/css/crm-admin.css', array(), '2.0.0');
        
        wp_enqueue_script('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/crm.js', array('jquery'), '2.0.0', true);
        
        wp_localize_script('akpp-crm', 'akppCrm', array(
            'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_crm_nonce'),
        ));
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');
add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');

// Helper Functions
function akpp_get_option($key, $default = '') {
    return get_theme_mod($key, $default);
}

// Customizer
function akpp_customize_register($wp_customize) {
    $wp_customize->add_section('akpp_contacts', array(
        'title'    => 'Контакты',
        'priority' => 30,
    ));
    
    $fields = array(
        'phone_1'  => array('label' => 'Телефон 1', 'default' => '+7 (963) 866-99-96'),
        'phone_2'  => array('label' => 'Телефон 2', 'default' => ''),
        'telegram' => array('label' => 'Telegram', 'default' => '@akppkgn'),
        'address'  => array('label' => 'Адрес', 'default' => 'г. Курган'),
    );
    
    foreach ($fields as $key => $field) {
        $wp_customize->add_setting($key, array(
            'default'           => $field['default'],
            'sanitize_callback' => 'sanitize_text_field',
        ));
        $wp_customize->add_control($key, array(
            'label'   => $field['label'],
            'section' => 'akpp_contacts',
            'type'    => 'text',
        ));
    }
}
add_action('customize_register', 'akpp_customize_register');

// Contact Form Handler
function akpp_handle_contact_form() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_kurgan_nonce', 'nonce');
    
    $name    = sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? '');
    $phone   = sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? '');
    $message = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['message'] ?? '');
    
    if (empty($name) || empty($phone)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
    }
    
    $to      = get_option('admin_email');
    $subject = 'Новая заявка с сайта АКПП Курган';
    $body    = "Имя: {$name}\nТелефон: {$phone}\n\nСообщение:\n{$message}";
    $headers = array('Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8');
    
    if (wp_mail($to, $subject, $body, $headers)) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Заявка отправлена!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка отправки'));
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_contact_form', 'akpp_handle_contact_form');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_akpp_contact_form', 'akpp_handle_contact_form');

// ============================================
// ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ CRM МОДУЛЕЙ
// ============================================
if (is_admin()) {
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/config.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/database.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-employees.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vin-decoder.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-amayama.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transakpp.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vehicles.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transmissions.php';
}
```

### 3. **Создать `inc/crm/assets/css/crm-admin.css`:**

Создай папку `assets` внутри `inc/crm/` и в ней файл `crm-admin.css` с кодом который я давал выше (кибер-стиль).

### ASSISTANT
# 🚀 ФИНАЛЬНАЯ ДОРАБОТКА CRM - РАБОТАЮЩАЯ ВЕРСИЯ

Проанализировал твою структуру. Вижу что файлы есть, но **CRM не работает** потому что:
1. Файлы CRM не подключены в `functions.php`
2. Нет CSS файла с кибер-стилем
3. Пути могут быть неверные

---

## 📋 ПЛАН ИСПРАВЛЕНИЯ:

### 1️⃣ **Создать недостающие файлы CRM**

Создай эти файлы в `wp-content/themes/akpp-kurgan/inc/crm/`:

```php
<?php
// inc/crm/config.php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

define('AKPP_CRM_VERSION', '1.0.0');
define('AKPP_CRM_PREFIX', 'akpp_');
define('AKPP_CRM_NONCE', 'akpp_crm_nonce');
define('AKPP_STATUS_NEW', 'new');
define('AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC', 'diagnostic');
define('AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION', 'negotiation');
define('AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK', 'in_work');
define('AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED', 'completed');
define('AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED', 'rejected');

function akpp_get_status_label($status) {
    $labels = array(
        AKPP_STATUS_NEW => '🆕 Новая',
        AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC => '🔍 Диагностика',
        AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION => '💬 Согласование',
        AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK => ' В работе',
        AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED => '✅ Завершено',
        AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED => '❌ Отказ'
    );
    return $labels[$status] ?? $status;
}

function akpp_get_status_color($status) {
    $colors = array(
        AKPP_STATUS_NEW => '#3b82f6',
        AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC => '#f59e0b',
        AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION => '#8b5cf6',
        AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK => '#f97316',
        AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED => '#10b981',
        AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED => '#ef4444'
    );
    return $colors[$status] ?? '#6b7280';
}

function akpp_format_money($amount) {
    return number_format((float)$amount, 0, ',', ' ') . ' ₽';
}

function akpp_sanitize_phone($phone) {
    return preg_replace('/[^0-9+]/', '', $phone);
}
```

### 2️⃣ **Создать `inc/crm/database.php`**

```php
<?php
// inc/crm/database.php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Database {
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'create_tables'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'populate_initial_data'));
    }

    public function create_tables() {
        global $wpdb;
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();

        $sql_deals = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            client_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            client_phone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            client_vin VARCHAR(17) DEFAULT NULL,
            client_body_number VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            client_plate VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_brand VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_model VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_year INT DEFAULT NULL,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            employee_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
            problem_description TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            parts_cost DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            employee_payment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            deal_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',
            received_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            completed_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            notes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY idx_status (status),
            KEY idx_client_vin (client_vin),
            KEY idx_created_at (created_at)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        $sql_employees = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            position VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            phone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            salary_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'percent',
            salary_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.00,
            fixed_salary DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY idx_is_active (is_active)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        $sql_vehicles = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            brand VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            model VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            year_from INT NOT NULL,
            year_to INT DEFAULT NULL,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            engine VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            drive_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY idx_unique_vehicle (brand, model, year_from, transmission_code),
            KEY idx_brand (brand),
            KEY idx_transmission (transmission_code)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        $sql_transmissions = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            manufacturer VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            gears INT DEFAULT NULL,
            description TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            repair_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            transakpp_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
            manual_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY idx_code (code),
            KEY idx_manufacturer (manufacturer)
        ) $charset_collate;";

        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql_deals);
        dbDelta($sql_employees);
        dbDelta($sql_vehicles);
        dbDelta($sql_transmissions);
    }

    public function populate_initial_data() {
        $check = get_option('akpp_db_initialized_v1', false);
        if ($check) return;

        $this->insert_sample_data();
        update_option('akpp_db_initialized_v1', true);
    }

    private function insert_sample_data() {
        global $wpdb;

        // Sample employees
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        if ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table") == 0) {
            $wpdb->insert($table, array(
                'name' => 'Иванов Иван',
                'position' => 'Мастер АКПП',
                'phone' => '+79638669996',
                'salary_type' => 'percent',
                'salary_percent' => 10.00,
                'is_active' => 1
            ));
        }

        // Sample transmissions
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions';
        if ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table") == 0) {
            $transmissions = array(
                array('A340E', 'Aisin A340E', 'Aisin Warner', 'Automatic', 4, '4-ст АКПП Toyota RWD', 50000, '33000-30520', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/toyota/a340e', ''),
                array('A650E', 'Aisin A650E', 'Aisin Warner', 'Automatic', 6, '6-ст АКПП Toyota/Lexus', 50000, '33000-30650', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/toyota/a650e', ''),
                array('U660E', 'Aisin U660E', 'Aisin Warner', 'Automatic', 6, '6-ст АКПП Toyota FWD', 60000, '33000-30820', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/toyota/u660e', ''),
                array('FS5A-EL', 'Mazda FS5A-EL', 'Mazda/Ford', 'Automatic', 5, '5-ст АКПП Mazda', 55000, '', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/mazda/fs5a-el', ''),
                array('6F35', 'Ford 6F35', 'Ford/GM', 'Automatic', 6, '6-ст АКПП Ford Focus', 60000, '', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/ford/6f35', ''),
                array('A4CF1', 'Hyundai A4CF1', 'Hyundai Powertech', 'Automatic', 4, '4-ст АКПП Hyundai Solaris', 50000, '', 'https://www.transakpp.ru/hyundai/a4cf1', ''),
            );
            foreach ($transmissions as $trans) {
                $wpdb->insert($table, array(
                    'code' => $trans[0], 'name' => $trans[1], 'manufacturer' => $trans[2],
                    'type' => $trans[3], 'gears' => $trans[4], 'description' => $trans[5],
                    'repair_price' => $trans[6], 'amayama_code' => $trans[7],
                    'transakpp_url' => $trans[8], 'manual_url' => $trans[9]
                ));
            }
        }
    }
}

new AKPP_Database();
```

### 3️⃣ **Обновить `functions.php`** (ПОЛНОСТЬЮ ЗАМЕНИТЬ)

```php
<?php
/**
 * АКПП Курган - Theme Functions
 * Version: 2.0.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

// Theme Setup
function akpp_setup() {
    add_theme_support('title-tag');
    add_theme_support('post-thumbnails');
    add_theme_support('html5', array('search-form', 'comment-form', 'comment-list', 'gallery', 'caption'));
    register_nav_menus(array('primary' => 'Главное меню', 'footer' => 'Меню в подвале'));
}
add_action('after_setup_theme', 'akpp_setup');

// Enqueue Scripts & Styles
function akpp_enqueue_assets() {
    // Frontend
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-style', get_stylesheet_uri(), array(), '2.0.0');
    wp_enqueue_style('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/main.css', array(), '2.0.0');
    wp_enqueue_script('akpp-main', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/main.js', array('jquery'), '2.0.0', true);
    
    // Admin (CRM) - ТОЛЬКО В АДМИНКЕ
    if (is_admin()) {
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/css/crm.css', array(), '2.0.0');
        wp_enqueue_style('akpp-crm-admin', get_template_directory_uri() . '/inc/crm/assets/css/crm-admin.css', array(), '2.0.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('akpp-crm', get_template_directory_uri() . '/assets/js/crm.js', array('jquery'), '2.0.0', true);
        
        wp_localize_script('akpp-crm', 'akppCrm', array(
            'ajaxUrl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce'   => wp_create_nonce('akpp_crm_nonce'),
        ));
    }
}
add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');
add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', 'akpp_enqueue_assets');

// Helper Functions
function akpp_get_option($key, $default = '') {
    return get_theme_mod($key, $default);
}

// Contact Form Handler
function akpp_handle_contact_form() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_kurgan_nonce', 'nonce');
    $name = sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? '');
    $phone = sanitize_text_field($_POST['phone'] ?? '');
    $message = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['message'] ?? '');
    
    if (empty($name) || empty($phone)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
    }
    
    $to = get_option('admin_email');
    $subject = 'Новая заявка с сайта АКПП Курган';
    $body = "Имя: {$name}\nТелефон: {$phone}\n\nСообщение:\n{$message}";
    
    if (wp_mail($to, $subject, $body)) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Заявка отправлена!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка отправки'));
    }
}
add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_contact_form', 'akpp_handle_contact_form');
add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_akpp_contact_form', 'akpp_handle_contact_form');

// ============================================
// ПОДКЛЮЧЕНИЕ CRM МОДУЛЕЙ (ТОЛЬКО В АДМИНКЕ)
// ============================================
if (is_admin()) {
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/config.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/database.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-employees.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vin-decoder.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-amayama.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transakpp.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-vehicles.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transmissions.php';
}
```

### 5️⃣ **Создать `assets/js/crm.js`**

```javascript
// assets/js/crm.js
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    // Автоматический расчет выплаты сотруднику
    function calculatePayment() {
        const percent = parseFloat($('#employee-id option:selected').data('percent')) || 0;
        const price = parseFloat($('#deal-price').val()) || 0;
        if (percent > 0 && price > 0) {
            $('#employee-payment').val((price * percent / 100).toFixed(2));
        }
    }
    
    $('#employee-id, #deal-price').on('change input', calculatePayment);
    
    // Загрузка моделей по марке
    $('#car-brand').on('change', function() {
        const brand = $(this).val();
        const select = $('#car-model');
        select.html('<option value="">Загрузка...</option>');
        
        if (brand) {
            $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, { 
                action: 'akpp_get_models_by_brand', 
                nonce: akppCrm.nonce, 
                brand: brand 
            }, function(res) {
                if (res.success) {
                    let opts = '<option value="">-- Выберите модель --</option>';
                    res.data.forEach(m => opts += `<option value="${m}">${m}</option>`);
                    select.html(opts);
                }
            });
        }
    });
});
```

Создаю все файлы с нуля. Копируй каждый файл целиком.

## 📄 1. `inc/crm/config.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Configuration
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

// Constants
define('AKPP_CRM_VERSION', '1.0.0');
define('AKPP_CRM_NONCE', 'akpp_crm_nonce');

// Statuses
define('AKPP_STATUS_NEW', 'new');
define('AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC', 'diagnostic');
define('AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION', 'negotiation');
define('AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK', 'in_work');
define('AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED', 'completed');
define('AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED', 'rejected');

// Salary Types
define('AKPP_SALARY_PERCENT', 'percent');
define('AKPP_SALARY_FIXED', 'fixed');

// Helper: Get status label
function akpp_get_status_label($status) {
    $labels = array(
        AKPP_STATUS_NEW        => '🆕 Новая',
        AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC => '🔍 Диагностика',
        AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION => '💬 Согласование',
        AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK    => '🔧 В работе',
        AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED  => '✅ Завершено',
        AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED   => '❌ Отказ',
    );
    return $labels[$status] ?? $status;
}

// Helper: Get status color
function akpp_get_status_color($status) {
    $colors = array(
        AKPP_STATUS_NEW        => '#3b82f6',
        AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC => '#f59e0b',
        AKPP_STATUS_NEGOTIATION => '#8b5cf6',
        AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK    => '#f97316',
        AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED  => '#10b981',
        AKPP_STATUS_REJECTED   => '#ef4444',
    );
    return $colors[$status] ?? '#6b7280';
}

// Helper: Format money
function akpp_format_money($amount) {
    return number_format((float)$amount, 0, ',', ' ') . ' ₽';
}

// Helper: Sanitize phone
function akpp_sanitize_phone($phone) {
    return preg_replace('/[^0-9+]/', '', $phone);
}
```

---

## 📄 2. `inc/crm/database.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * Database Setup & Management
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_Database {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'create_tables'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'populate_initial_data'));
    }
    
    public function create_tables() {
        global $wpdb;
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        // Deals table
        $sql_deals = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            client_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            client_phone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            client_vin VARCHAR(17) DEFAULT NULL,
            client_body_number VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            client_plate VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_brand VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_model VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            car_year INT DEFAULT NULL,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            employee_id BIGINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL,
            problem_description TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            parts_cost DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            employee_payment DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            deal_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            status VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'new',
            received_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            completed_date DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
            notes TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY idx_status (status),
            KEY idx_client_phone (client_phone),
            KEY idx_client_vin (client_vin),
            KEY idx_created_at (created_at),
            KEY idx_employee (employee_id)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        // Employees table
        $sql_employees = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            position VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            phone VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            email VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            salary_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'percent',
            salary_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.00,
            fixed_salary DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            KEY idx_is_active (is_active),
            KEY idx_name (name)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        // Vehicles table
        $sql_vehicles = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            brand VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            model VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
            year_from INT NOT NULL,
            year_to INT DEFAULT NULL,
            transmission_code VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            engine VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            drive_type VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY idx_unique_vehicle (brand, model, year_from, transmission_code),
            KEY idx_brand (brand),
            KEY idx_model (model),
            KEY idx_transmission (transmission_code)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        // Transmissions table
        $sql_transmissions = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions (
            id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
            name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
            manufacturer VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            type VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL,
            gears INT DEFAULT NULL,
            description TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
            repair_price DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
            amayama_code VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
            transakpp_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
            manual_url VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL,
            created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY (id),
            UNIQUE KEY idx_code (code),
            KEY idx_manufacturer (manufacturer)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql_deals);
        dbDelta($sql_employees);
        dbDelta($sql_vehicles);
        dbDelta($sql_transmissions);
    }
    
    public function populate_initial_data() {
        $check = get_option('akpp_db_initialized_v1', false);
        if ($check) {
            return;
        }
        
        $this->insert_sample_employees();
        
        update_option('akpp_db_initialized_v1', true);
    }
    
    private function insert_sample_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        
        $count = $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table");
        if ($count > 0) {
            return;
        }
        
        $employees = array(
            array('Иванов Иван Иванович', 'Мастер АКПП', '+79638669996', 'percent', 10.00, 0),
            array('Петров Петр Петрович', 'Мастер АКПП', '+79638669997', 'percent', 10.00, 0),
        );
        
        foreach ($employees as $emp) {
            $wpdb->insert($table, array(
                'name'           => $emp[0],
                'position'       => $emp[1],
                'phone'          => $emp[2],
                'salary_type'    => $emp[3],
                'salary_percent' => $emp[4],
                'fixed_salary'   => $emp[5],
                'is_active'      => 1,
            ));
        }
    }
}

new AKPP_Database();
```

---

## 📄 3. `inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Deals Management
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Deals {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_deal', array($this, 'save_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deal', array($this, 'get_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_deal', array($this, 'delete_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deals', array($this, 'get_deals'));
    }
    
    public function save_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'client_name'         => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_name'] ?? ''),
            'client_phone'        => akpp_sanitize_phone($_POST['client_phone'] ?? ''),
            'client_vin'          => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_vin'] ?? '')),
            'client_body_number'  => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_body_number'] ?? '')),
            'client_plate'        => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_plate'] ?? '')),
            'car_brand'           => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_brand'] ?? ''),
            'car_model'           => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_model'] ?? ''),
            'car_year'            => intval($_POST['car_year'] ?? 0),
            'transmission_code'   => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? ''),
            'employee_id'         => intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0),
            'problem_description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['problem_description'] ?? ''),
            'parts_cost'          => floatval($_POST['parts_cost'] ?? 0),
            'employee_payment'    => floatval($_POST['employee_payment'] ?? 0),
            'deal_price'          => floatval($_POST['deal_price'] ?? 0),
            'status'              => sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? AKPP_STATUS_NEW),
            'received_date'       => sanitize_text_field($_POST['received_date'] ?? ''),
            'completed_date'      => sanitize_text_field($_POST['completed_date'] ?? ''),
            'notes'               => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['notes'] ?? ''),
        );
        
        if (empty($data['client_name']) || empty($data['client_phone'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Заполните обязательные поля'));
        }
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $deal_id));
            
            if ($result !== false) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка обновлена', 'deal_id' => $deal_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка обновления'));
            }
        } else {
            $data['created_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            
            if ($result) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка создана', 'deal_id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка создания'));
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function get_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $table WHERE id = %d", $deal_id));
        
        if ($deal) {
            wp_send_json_success($deal);
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Сделка не найдена'));
        }
    }
    
    public function delete_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $result = $wpdb->delete($table, array('id' => $deal_id));
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка удалена'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка удаления'));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_deals() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? '');
        $search = sanitize_text_field($_POST['search'] ?? '');
        $page = intval($_POST['page'] ?? 1);
        $per_page = 50;
        
        $where = array('1=1');
        $params = array();
        
        if (!empty($status)) {
            $where[] = 'status = %s';
            $params[] = $status;
        }
        
        if (!empty($search)) {
            $where[] = '(client_name LIKE %s OR client_phone LIKE %s OR client_vin LIKE %s)';
            $search_param = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
        }
        
        $where_clause = implode(' AND ', $where);
        
        $total = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table WHERE $where_clause", $params));
        
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $per_page;
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM $table WHERE $where_clause ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d", array_merge($params, array($per_page, $offset))));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'deals'    => $deals,
            'total'    => intval($total),
            'page'     => $page,
            'per_page' => $per_page,
            'pages'    => ceil($total / $per_page),
        ));
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Deals();
```

## 📄 4. `inc/crm/class-crm-employees.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Employees Management
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Employees {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_employee', array($this, 'save_employee'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_employee', array($this, 'delete_employee'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_employees', array($this, 'get_employees'));
    }
    
    public function save_employee() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        
        $employee_id = intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'name'           => sanitize_text_field($_POST['name'] ?? ''),
            'position'       => sanitize_text_field($_POST['position'] ?? ''),
            'phone'          => akpp_sanitize_phone($_POST['phone'] ?? ''),
            'email'          => sanitize_email($_POST['email'] ?? ''),
            'salary_type'    => sanitize_text_field($_POST['salary_type'] ?? AKPP_SALARY_PERCENT),
            'salary_percent' => floatval($_POST['salary_percent'] ?? 0),
            'fixed_salary'   => floatval($_POST['fixed_salary'] ?? 0),
            'is_active'      => intval($_POST['is_active'] ?? 1),
        );
        
        if (empty($data['name'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Укажите ФИО'));
        }
        
        if ($data['salary_type'] === AKPP_SALARY_PERCENT && ($data['salary_percent'] <= 0 || $data['salary_percent'] > 100)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Процент должен быть от 0 до 100'));
        }
        
        if ($employee_id > 0) {
            $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $employee_id));
            
            if ($result !== false) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник обновлен'));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка обновления'));
            }
        } else {
            $data['created_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            
            if ($result) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник добавлен', 'employee_id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка добавления'));
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function delete_employee() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        
        $employee_id = intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($employee_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $result = $wpdb->delete($table, array('id' => $employee_id));
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сотрудник удален'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка удаления'));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_employees() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_employees';
        
        $active_only = isset($_POST['active_only']) && $_POST['active_only'] === '1';
        
        $where = $active_only ? 'WHERE is_active = 1' : '';
        
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $table $where ORDER BY name ASC");
        
        wp_send_json_success($employees);
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Employees();
```

## 📄 5. `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Admin Pages
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Admin {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_menu_pages'));
    }
    
    public function add_menu_pages() {
        add_menu_page(
            'CRM АКПП',
            'CRM',
            'manage_options',
            'akpp-crm',
            array($this, 'render_dashboard'),
            'dashicons-dashboard',
            3
        );
        
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Панель', '📊 Панель', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сделки', '📋 Сделки', 'manage_options', 'akpp-deals', array($this, 'render_deals'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Новая сделка', '➕ Новая', 'manage_options', 'akpp-new-deal', array($this, 'render_deal_form'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сотрудники', '👥 Сотрудники', 'manage_options', 'akpp-employees', array($this, 'render_employees'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Авто', '🚗 Авто', 'manage_options', 'akpp-vehicles', array($this, 'render_vehicles'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'АКПП', '⚙️ АКПП', 'manage_options', 'akpp-transmissions', array($this, 'render_transmissions'));
    }
    
    public function render_dashboard() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $stats = array(
            'total_deals'      => $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table"),
            'active_deals'     => $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status IN (%s, %s, %s)", AKPP_STATUS_NEW, AKPP_STATUS_DIAGNOSTIC, AKPP_STATUS_IN_WORK)),
            'completed_deals'  => $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = %s", AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED)),
            'total_revenue'    => $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = %s", AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED)) ?: 0,
            'total_parts_cost' => $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = %s", AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED)) ?: 0,
            'total_salary'     => $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = %s", AKPP_STATUS_COMPLETED)) ?: 0,
        );
        
        $stats['balance'] = $stats['total_revenue'] - $stats['total_parts_cost'] - $stats['total_salary'];
        
        $recent_deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/dashboard.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deals() {
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deals.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deal_form() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $deal_id = intval($_GET['id'] ?? 0);
        $deal = null;
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d", $deal_id));
        }
        
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC");
        $brands = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand ASC");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php';
    }
    
    public function render_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees ORDER BY name ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/employees.php';
    }
    
    public function render_vehicles() {
        global $wpdb;
        $vehicles = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand, model, year_from DESC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/vehicles.php';
    }
    
    public function render_transmissions() {
        global $wpdb;
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/transmissions.php';
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Admin();
```

## 📄 6. `inc/crm/class-vin-decoder.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * VIN Decoder
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_VIN_Decoder {
    
    private $nhtsa_api = 'https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/api/vehicles/DecodeVin/';
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_vin', array($this, 'decode_vin'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_body_number', array($this, 'decode_body_number'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_models_by_brand', array($this, 'get_models_by_brand'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_transmission_by_vehicle', array($this, 'get_transmission_by_vehicle'));
    }
    
    public function decode_vin() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $vin = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['vin'] ?? ''));
        
        if (strlen($vin) !== 17) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN должен содержать 17 символов'));
        }
        
        $response = wp_remote_get($this->nhtsa_api . $vin . '/json', array('timeout' => 15));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка подключения к API'));
        }
        
        $body = wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
        $data = json_decode($body, true);
        
        if (empty($data['Results'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN не найден в базе'));
        }
        
        $result = array();
        foreach ($data['Results'] as $item) {
            if (!empty($item['Value'])) {
                $result[$item['Variable']] = $item['Value'];
            }
        }
        
        $make = $result['Make'] ?? '';
        $model = $result['Model'] ?? '';
        $year = intval($result['Model Year'] ?? 0);
        
        $transmission = $this->find_transmission_by_vehicle($make, $model, $year);
        
        $decoded = array(
            'vin'                        => $vin,
            'make'                       => $make,
            'model'                      => $model,
            'year'                       => $year,
            'engine'                     => trim(($result['Engine Configuration'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($result['Displacement (L)'] ?? '') . 'L'),
            'cylinders'                  => $result['Cylinders'] ?? '',
            'drive_type'                 => $result['Drive Type'] ?? '',
            'transmission_style'         => $result['Transmission Style'] ?? '',
            'body_class'                 => $result['Body Class'] ?? '',
            'plant_country'              => $result['Plant Country'] ?? '',
            'suggested_transmission'     => $transmission['code'] ?? '',
            'suggested_transmission_name' => $transmission['name'] ?? '',
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success($decoded);
    }
    
    public function decode_body_number() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $body_number = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['body_number'] ?? ''));
        
        if (empty($body_number)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите номер кузова'));
        }
        
        if (preg_match('/^([A-Z]{3})(\d{2,3})[-]?(\d+)$/', $body_number, $matches)) {
            $model_code = $matches[1] . $matches[2];
            $serial = $matches[3];
            
            $brand = $this->get_brand_by_model_code($model_code);
            $model = $this->get_model_by_code($model_code);
            
            $transmission = $this->find_transmission_by_vehicle($brand, $model, date('Y'));
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'body_number'              => $body_number,
                'model_code'               => $model_code,
                'serial'                   => $serial,
                'brand'                    => $brand,
                'model'                    => $model,
                'suggested_transmission'   => $transmission['code'] ?? '',
                'suggested_transmission_name' => $transmission['name'] ?? '',
            ));
        }
        
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не удалось расшифровать номер кузова'));
    }
    
    public function get_models_by_brand() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Укажите марку'));
        }
        
        $models = $wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare("SELECT DISTINCT model FROM $table WHERE brand = %s ORDER BY model ASC", $brand));
        
        wp_send_json_success($models);
    }
    
    public function get_transmission_by_vehicle() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        $model = sanitize_text_field($_POST['model'] ?? '');
        $year = intval($_POST['year'] ?? 0);
        
        $transmission = $this->find_transmission_by_vehicle($brand, $model, $year);
        
        wp_send_json_success($transmission);
    }
    
    private function find_transmission_by_vehicle($brand, $model, $year) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        $vehicle = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT transmission_code FROM $table 
             WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from <= %d 
             AND (year_to >= %d OR year_to IS NULL OR year_to = 0)
             ORDER BY year_from DESC LIMIT 1",
            $brand, $model, $year, $year
        ));
        
        if (!$vehicle || empty($vehicle->transmission_code)) {
            return array('code' => '', 'name' => '');
        }
        
        $trans_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions';
        $transmission = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare("SELECT code, name FROM $trans_table WHERE code = %s", $vehicle->transmission_code));
        
        return array(
            'code' => $vehicle->transmission_code,
            'name' => $transmission ? $transmission->name : '',
        );
    }
    
    private function get_brand_by_model_code($code) {
        $brands = array(
            'UZZ' => 'Lexus', 'JZZ' => 'Toyota', 'GZZ' => 'Toyota',
            'JZS' => 'Toyota', 'UZX' => 'Lexus', 'JZX' => 'Toyota',
            'GX' => 'Lexus', 'UZ' => 'Lexus', 'JZ' => 'Toyota',
            'GRX' => 'Toyota', 'ARS' => 'Toyota', 'GWS' => 'Toyota',
        );
        
        foreach ($brands as $prefix => $brand) {
            if (strpos($code, $prefix) === 0) {
                return $brand;
            }
        }
        
        return 'Toyota';
    }
    
    private function get_model_by_code($code) {
        $models = array(
            'UZZ30' => 'Soarer', 'UZZ31' => 'Soarer', 'UZZ32' => 'Soarer',
            'JZZ30' => 'Supra', 'JZZ31' => 'Supra',
            'JZX90' => 'Mark II', 'JZX100' => 'Mark II', 'JZX110' => 'Mark II',
            'GX71' => 'Mark II', 'GX81' => 'Mark II',
            'UZS161' => 'Crown', 'UZS186' => 'Crown',
            'GRX130' => 'Crown', 'ARS220' => 'Crown',
            'GWS224' => 'Crown',
        );
        
        return $models[$code] ?? 'Unknown';
    }
}

new AKPP_VIN_Decoder();
```

## 📄 7. `inc/crm/class-amayama.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * Amayama Integration
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_Amayama {
    
    private $base_url = 'https://www.amayama.com';
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_search', array($this, 'search'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_get_catalog', array($this, 'get_catalog'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_amayama_get_parts', array($this, 'get_parts'));
    }
    
    public function search() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $query = sanitize_text_field($_POST['query'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($query)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите поисковый запрос'));
        }
        
        $url = $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode($query);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('url' => $url, 'message' => 'Поиск в Amayama'));
    }
    
    public function get_catalog() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        $model = sanitize_text_field($_POST['model'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand) || empty($model)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Укажите марку и модель'));
        }
        
        $brand_slug = strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $brand));
        $model_slug = strtolower(str_replace(' ', '-', $model));
        
        $url = $this->base_url . "/ru/catalog/{$brand_slug}/{$model_slug}/";
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('url' => $url, 'message' => 'Каталог открыт'));
    }
    
    public function get_parts() {
        check_ajax_referer(AKPP_CRM_NONCE, 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $transmission_code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($transmission_code)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Укажите код АКПП'));
        }
        
        $oem_db = array(
            'A340E' => array('filter' => '35330-30060', 'pan_gasket' => '35168-30010', 'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30520'),
            'A340F' => array('filter' => '35330-30060', 'pan_gasket' => '35168-30010', 'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30530'),
            'A650E' => array('filter' => '35330-30120', 'pan_gasket' => '35168-30050', 'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30650'),
            'U660E' => array('filter' => '35330-30150', 'pan_gasket' => '35168-30080', 'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30820'),
            'U760E' => array('filter' => '35330-30160', 'pan_gasket' => '35168-30090', 'overhaul_kit' => '33000-30840'),
        );
        
        $oem = $oem_db[$transmission_code] ?? array();
        
        $parts = array(
            'filters' => array(
                'name' => 'Масляные фильтры',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Фильтр основной', 'oem' => $oem['filter'] ?? '', 'amayama_url' => $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode($oem['filter'] ?? '')),
                    array('name' => 'Фильтр дополнительный', 'oem' => ($oem['filter'] ?? '') . '-SUB', 'amayama_url' => $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode(($oem['filter'] ?? '') . '-SUB')),
                ),
            ),
            'gaskets' => array(
                'name' => 'Прокладки и сальники',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Прокладка поддона', 'oem' => $oem['pan_gasket'] ?? '', 'amayama_url' => $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode($oem['pan_gasket'] ?? '')),
                    array('name' => 'Overhaul Kit', 'oem' => $oem['overhaul_kit'] ?? '', 'amayama_url' => $this->base_url . '/ru/search?code=' . urlencode($oem['overhaul_kit'] ?? '')),
                ),
            ),
            'frictions' => array(
                'name' => 'Фрикционы',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион C1', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-C1'),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион C2', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-C2'),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион B1', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-B1'),
                    array('name' => 'Фрикцион B2', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-B2'),
                ),
            ),
            'solenoids' => array(
                'name' => 'Соленоиды',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'Shift A', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-SOL-A'),
                    array('name' => 'Shift B', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-SOL-B'),
                    array('name' => 'Lock-up', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-SOL-LU'),
                    array('name' => 'Line Pressure', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-SOL-LP'),
                ),
            ),
            'torque_converter' => array(
                'name' => 'Гидротрансформатор',
                'items' => array(
                    array('name' => 'ГДТ в сборе', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-TC'),
                    array('name' => 'Ремкомплект ГДТ', 'oem' => $transmission_code . '-TC-KIT'),
                ),
            ),
        );
        
        wp_send_json_success($parts);
    }
}

new AKPP_Amayama();
```
