    public function add_menu_pages() {
        add_menu_page(
            'CRM АКПП',
            'CRM',
            'manage_options',
            'akpp-crm',
            array($this, 'render_dashboard'),
            'dashicons-dashboard',
            3
        );
        
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Панель', '📊 Панель', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сделки', '📋 Сделки', 'manage_options', 'akpp-deals', array($this, 'render_deals'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Новая сделка', '➕ Новая', 'manage_options', 'akpp-new-deal', array($this, 'render_deal_form'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сотрудники', '👥 Сотрудники', 'manage_options', 'akpp-employees', array($this, 'render_employees'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Авто', '🚗 Авто', 'manage_options', 'akpp-vehicles', array($this, 'render_vehicles'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'АКПП', '⚙️ АКПП', 'manage_options', 'akpp-transmissions', array($this, 'render_transmissions'));
    }
    
    public function render_dashboard() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $stats = array(
            'total_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table"),
            'active_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status IN ('new', 'diagnostic', 'in_work')"),
            'completed_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'"),
            'total_revenue' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_parts_cost' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_salary' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
        );
        
        $stats['balance'] = $stats['total_revenue'] - $stats['total_parts_cost'] - $stats['total_salary'];
        
        $recent_deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/dashboard.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deals() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deals.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deal_form() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $deal_id = isset($_GET['id']) ? intval($_GET['id']) : 0;
        $deal = null;
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d",
                $deal_id
            ));
        }
        
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC");
        $brands = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand ASC");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php';
    }
    
    public function render_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees ORDER BY name ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/employees.php';
    }
    
    public function render_vehicles() {
        global $wpdb;
        $vehicles = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand, model, year_from DESC LIMIT 500");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/vehicles.php';
    }
    
    public function render_transmissions() {
        global $wpdb;
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/transmissions.php';
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Admin();


теперь доработай их полностью

### ASSISTANT
# 🔧 ПОЛНАЯ ДОРАБОТКА CRM СИСТЕМЫ

Дорабатываю все три файла с полноценным парсером transakpp.ru.

---

## 📄 1. `inc/crm/class-transakpp-parser.php` (НОВЫЙ ПАРСЕР)

```php
<?php
/**
 * TransAKPP Parser - Реальный парсер transakpp.ru
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 4.0.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_TransAKPP_Parser {
    
    private $base_url = 'https://www.transakpp.ru';
    private $log = array();
    private $stats = array('parsed' => 0, 'saved' => 0, 'errors' => 0);
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_run_transakpp_parser', array($this, 'ajax_run_parser'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_parser_progress', array($this, 'ajax_get_progress'));
    }
    
    public function log($message, $type = 'info') {
        $this->log[] = array(
            'time' => current_time('H:i:s'),
            'type' => $type,
            'message' => $message
        );
    }
    
    public function get_stats() {
        return $this->stats;
    }
    
    public function get_log() {
        return $this->log;
    }
    
    public function ajax_run_parser() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        set_time_limit(600);
        $this->log('🚀 Запуск парсера TransAKPP.ru', 'info');
        
        $this->run_full_parse();
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'stats' => $this->stats,
            'log' => $this->log
        ));
    }
    
    public function ajax_get_progress() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'stats' => $this->stats,
            'log' => $this->log
        ));
    }
    
    /**
     * Полный цикл парсинга
     */
    private function run_full_parse() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Шаг 1: Получаем главную страницу
        $this->log('📡 Получение главной страницы...', 'info');
        $main_html = $this->fetch_url($this->base_url . '/232/main/');
        
        if (!$main_html) {
            $this->log('❌ Не удалось получить главную страницу', 'error');
            $this->stats['errors']++;
            return;
        }
        
        $this->log('✅ Главная страница получена (' . strlen($main_html) . ' байт)', 'success');
        
        // Шаг 2: Находим все категории (ссылки на марки авто)
        $this->log('🔍 Поиск категорий производителей...', 'info');
        $categories = $this->extract_categories($main_html);
        
        $this->log('✅ Найдено категорий: ' . count($categories), 'success');
        
        // Шаг 3: Парсим каждую категорию
        foreach ($categories as $brand => $url) {
            $this->log("📂 Парсинг категории: $brand", 'info');
            $this->parse_category($brand, $url);
            usleep(300000); // Пауза 0.3 сек между категориями
        }
        
        $this->log("🎉 Парсинг завершен! Сохранено: {$this->stats['saved']}, Ошибок: {$this->stats['errors']}", 'success');
    }
    
    /**
     * Извлечение категорий с главной страницы
     */
    private function extract_categories($html) {
        $categories = array();
        
        // Ищем ссылки вида /232/main/toyota/ или /232/toyota/
        preg_match_all('/href=["\']([^"\']*\/232\/(main\/)?([a-z]+)\/?)["\']/i', $html, $matches, PREG_SET_ORDER);
        
        foreach ($matches as $match) {
            $brand = strtolower($match[3]);
            $url = $this->base_url . '/232/' . $brand . '/';
            
            // Исключаем служебные страницы
            $exclude = array('main', 'info', 'sale', 'karta', 'contacts', 'about');
            if (!in_array($brand, $exclude)) {
                $categories[$brand] = $url;
            }
        }
        
        return array_unique($categories);
    }
    
    /**
     * Парсинг категории (марки авто)
     */
    private function parse_category($brand, $url) {
        $html = $this->fetch_url($url);
        
        if (!$html) {
            $this->log("  ❌ Не удалось получить категорию $brand", 'error');
            $this->stats['errors']++;
            return;
        }
        
        // Ищем ссылки на конкретные АКПП
        preg_match_all('/href=["\']([^"\']*\/232\/[^"\']*\.html)["\']/i', $html, $matches);
        
        $links = array_unique($matches[1]);
        $this->log("  📄 Найдено АКПП в категории: " . count($links), 'info');
        
        foreach ($links as $link) {
            $full_url = strpos($link, 'http') === 0 ? $link : $this->base_url . $link;
            $this->parse_transmission_page($brand, $full_url);
            usleep(200000); // Пауза 0.2 сек
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Парсинг страницы конкретной АКПП
     */
    private function parse_transmission_page($brand, $url) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Извлекаем код АКПП из URL
        if (!preg_match('/\/([^\/]+)\.html$/i', $url, $m)) {
            return;
        }
        $code = strtoupper($m[1]);
        
        // Пропускаем служебные страницы
        $skip = array('MAIN', 'INFO', 'SALE', 'KARTA', 'CONTACTS', 'ABOUT', 'INDEX');
        if (in_array($code, $skip) || strlen($code) < 3) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Проверяем, есть ли уже в базе
        $exists = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions WHERE code = %s",
            $code
        ));
        
        if ($exists) {
            $this->log("  ⏭️  $code - уже в базе", 'info');
            return;
        }
        
        $html = $this->fetch_url($url);
        if (!$html) {
            $this->log("  ❌ $code - не удалось загрузить", 'error');
            $this->stats['errors']++;
            return;
        }
        
        // Извлекаем данные
        $data = $this->extract_data($html, $brand, $code, $url);
        
        if (!$data || empty($data['name'])) {
            $this->log("  ⚠️  $code - не удалось извлечь данные", 'warning');
            $this->stats['errors']++;
            return;
        }
        
        // Сохраняем в базу
        $result = $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions', $data);
        
        if ($result) {
            $this->stats['saved']++;
            $this->log("  ✅ $code - {$data['name']} - СОХРАНЕНА", 'success');
        } else {
            $this->stats['errors']++;
            $this->log("  ❌ $code - ошибка БД: " . $wpdb->last_error, 'error');
        }
        
        $this->stats['parsed']++;
    }
    
    /**
     * Извлечение данных из HTML страницы АКПП
     */
    private function extract_data($html, $brand, $code, $url) {
        $data = array(
            'code' => $code,
            'name' => '',
            'manufacturer' => $this->get_manufacturer($brand),
            'type' => 'Automatic',
            'type_detail' => '',
            'gears' => $this->detect_gears($code),
            'description' => '',
            'problems' => '',
            'repair_price' => 0,
            'amayama_code' => '',
            'transakpp_url' => $url,
            'manual_url' => '',
        );
        
        // Название (из h1 или title)
        if (preg_match('/<h1[^>]*>(.*?)<\/h1>/is', $html, $m)) {
            $data['name'] = trim(strip_tags($m[1]));
        } elseif (preg_match('/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/is', $html, $m)) {
            $data['name'] = trim(strip_tags($m[1]));
        }
        
        if (empty($data['name'])) {
            $data['name'] = $code;
        }
        
        // Описание - ищем основной текст
        $description = '';
        if (preg_match('/<div[^>]*class="[^"]*content[^"]*"[^>]*>(.*?)<\/div>/is', $html, $m)) {
            $description = strip_tags($m[1]);
        } elseif (preg_match('/<article[^>]*>(.*?)<\/article>/is', $html, $m)) {
            $description = strip_tags($m[1]);
        } elseif (preg_match_all('/<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\/p>/is', $html, $m)) {
            $description = strip_tags(implode(' ', $m[1]));
        }
        $data['description'] = trim(preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $description));
        
        // Проблемы и неисправности - ищем соответствующие разделы
        $problems = array();
        $problem_patterns = array(
            '/(?:проблемы|неисправности|типовые\s+неисправности|частые\s+проблемы|характерные\s+неисправности)[^<]*<\/h[2-4]>(.*?)(?:<\/div>|<h[2-4]|<\/section)/is',
            '/<h[2-4][^>]*>.*?(проблемы|неисправности).*?<\/h[2-4]>(.*?)(?:<\/div>|<h[2-4])/is',
        );
        
        foreach ($problem_patterns as $pattern) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $html, $m)) {
                $text = isset($m[2]) ? $m[2] : $m[1];
                if (preg_match_all('/<li[^>]*>(.*?)<\/li>/is', $text, $items)) {
                    foreach ($items[1] as $item) {
                        $problems[] = trim(strip_tags($item));
                    }
                }
                if (preg_match_all('/<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\/p>/is', $text, $items)) {
                    foreach ($items[1] as $item) {
                        $clean = trim(strip_tags($item));
                        if (!empty($clean) && strlen($clean) > 10) {
                            $problems[] = $clean;
                        }
                    }
                }
                break;
            }
        }
        
        $data['problems'] = implode("\n", array_unique($problems));
        
        // Определяем тип АКПП
        if (preg_match('/(вариатор|cvt|continuously\s+variable)/i', $html)) {
            $data['type'] = 'CVT';
        } elseif (preg_match('/(робот|dsg|dct|dual\s+clutch)/i', $html)) {
            $data['type'] = 'DCT';
        }
        
        // Цена ремонта
        if (preg_match('/(?:цена|стоимость)[^0-9]*(\d{4,6})/iu', $html, $m)) {
            $data['repair_price'] = intval($m[1]);
        } else {
            $data['repair_price'] = $this->estimate_price($data['gears'], $data['type']);
        }
        
        return $data;
    }
    
    /**
     * Получение производителя по бренду
     */
    private function get_manufacturer($brand) {
        $map = array(
            'toyota' => 'Aisin Warner',
            'lexus' => 'Aisin Warner',
            'mazda' => 'Jatco/Mazda',
            'ford' => 'Ford',
            'hyundai' => 'Hyundai Powertech',
            'kia' => 'Hyundai Powertech',
            'nissan' => 'Jatco',
            'infiniti' => 'Jatco',
            'mitsubishi' => 'Jatco',
            'bmw' => 'ZF',
            'vag' => 'VAG',
            'audi' => 'ZF/VAG',
            'gm' => 'General Motors',
            'chevrolet' => 'General Motors',
            'cadillac' => 'General Motors',
            'mercedes' => 'Mercedes-Benz',
            'honda' => 'Honda',
            'acura' => 'Honda',
            'subaru' => 'Subaru/Jatco',
            'volvo' => 'Aisin',
            'renault' => 'Peugeot/Citroen',
            'peugeot' => 'Peugeot/Citroen',
            'citroen' => 'Peugeot/Citroen',
            'opel' => 'GM',
            'dodge' => 'Chrysler',
            'jeep' => 'Chrysler',
        );
        
        return isset($map[$brand]) ? $map[$brand] : ucfirst($brand);
    }
    
    /**
     * Определение количества передач по коду
     */
    private function detect_gears($code) {
        $patterns = array(
            '/^A140/' => 4, '/^A241/' => 4, '/^A245/' => 4,
            '/^A340/' => 4, '/^A442/' => 4,
            '/^A540/' => 4, '/^A550/' => 5,
            '/^A650/' => 6, '/^A655/' => 6,
            '/^A750/' => 5, '/^A760/' => 6, '/^A761/' => 6,
            '/^A960/' => 6,
            '/^U140/' => 4, '/^U150/' => 4,
            '/^U241/' => 4, '/^U250/' => 5,
            '/^U340/' => 4, '/^U341/' => 4,
            '/^U660/' => 6, '/^U760/' => 6,
            '/^U880/' => 8,
            '/^FS5A/' => 5, '/^FNR5/' => 5, '/^FN4A/' => 4,
            '/^6F35/' => 6, '/^6F50/' => 6, '/^8F35/' => 8,
            '/^6R80/' => 6, '/^6R140/' => 6,
            '/^10R80/' => 10,
            '/^A4CF/' => 4, '/^A6CF/' => 6, '/^A8LF/' => 8,
            '/^A4AF/' => 4, '/^A6AF/' => 6, '/^A8CF/' => 8,
            '/^RE0F10/' => 0, '/^RE0F11/' => 0, // CVT
            '/^RE5R05/' => 5,
            '/^DP0/' => 4, '/^AL4/' => 4,
            '/^09G/' => 6, '/^09L/' => 6, '/^0B5/' => 7,
            '/^DL382/' => 7, '/^DL501/' => 7,
            '/^5HP/' => 5, '/^6HP/' => 6, '/^8HP/' => 8,
            '/^4L60/' => 4, '/^4L80/' => 4,
            '/^6L80/' => 6, '/^6L90/' => 6,
            '/^8L90/' => 8,
            '/^TF-80/' => 8, '/^TF-60/' => 6,
            '/^AW55/' => 5, '/^AWF8/' => 8, '/^AWF2/' => 6,
        );
        
        foreach ($patterns as $pattern => $gears) {
            if (preg_match($pattern, $code)) {
                return $gears;
            }
        }
        
        return 6;
    }
    
    /**
     * Оценка цены ремонта
     */
    private function estimate_price($gears, $type) {
        if ($type === 'CVT') return 55000;
        if ($type === 'DCT') return 65000;
        
        switch ($gears) {
            case 0: return 55000; // CVT
            case 4: return 45000;
            case 5: return 50000;
            case 6: return 60000;
            case 7: return 70000;
            case 8: return 75000;
            case 9: return 80000;
            case 10: return 85000;
            default: return 60000;
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Получение HTML страницы
     */
    private function fetch_url($url) {
        $response = wp_remote_get($url, array(
            'timeout' => 30,
            'user-agent' => 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36',
            'headers' => array(
                'Accept' => 'text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8',
                'Accept-Language' => 'ru-RU,ru;q=0.9,en;q=0.8',
            ),
            'sslverify' => false,
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            $this->log("  ❌ Ошибка HTTP: " . $response->get_error_message(), 'error');
            return false;
        }
        
        $code = wp_remote_retrieve_response_code($response);
        if ($code !== 200) {
            $this->log("  ❌ HTTP код: $code для $url", 'error');
            return false;
        }
        
        return wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
    }
}

new AKPP_TransAKPP_Parser();
```

---

## 📄 2. `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php` (ДОРАБОТАННЫЙ)

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Admin Pages
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 3.2.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Admin {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_menu_pages'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'add_inline_styles'), 999);
        
        // AJAX обработчики
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_clear_transmissions_db', array($this, 'ajax_clear_db'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_run_parser', array($this, 'ajax_run_parser'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Очистка базы АКПП
     */
    public function ajax_clear_db() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $wpdb->query("TRUNCATE TABLE {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions");
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'База АКПП очищена'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Запуск парсера
     */
    public function ajax_run_parser() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        // Создаем экземпляр парсера и запускаем
        $parser = new AKPP_TransAKPP_Parser();
        $parser->run_full_parse_public();
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'stats' => $parser->get_stats(),
            'log' => $parser->get_log()
        ));
    }
    
    /**
     * Inline стили
     */
    public function add_inline_styles() {
        $screen = get_current_screen();
        if (!$screen || strpos($screen->id, 'akpp') === false) {
            return;
        }
        ?>
        <style>
        .akpp-crm-dashboard { max-width: 1400px; margin: 20px auto; padding: 20px; background: #0a0f1c; border-radius: 12px; color: #e5e7eb; }
        .akpp-crm-dashboard h1 { color: #00ff88; font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 30px; text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,255,136,0.3); }
        .akpp-crm-dashboard h3 { color: #00ff88; font-size: 20px; margin: 0 0 20px 0; }
        .akpp-stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 40px; }
        .akpp-stat-card { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2332 0%, #0f1720 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; transition: all 0.3s ease; }
        .akpp-stat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,255,136,0.2); }
        .akpp-stat-card .stat-number { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #00ff88; margin: 0; }
        .akpp-stat-card .stat-content h3 { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 14px; margin: 0 0 8px 0; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .akpp-form-section { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a2332 0%, #0f1720 100%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); border-radius: 12px; padding: 30px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .form-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; }
        .form-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
        .form-group label { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .form-group input, .form-group select, .form-group textarea { background: #0a0f1c; border: 2px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.3); color: #fff; padding: 12px 15px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 15px; }
        .form-group input:focus, .form-group select:focus, .form-group textarea:focus { outline: none; border-color: #00ff88; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,255,136,0.3); }
        .button-primary, .button-hero.button-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00ff88 0%, #00cc6a 100%) !important; border: none !important; color: #0a0f1c !important; font-weight: 600 !important; padding: 14px 28px !important; border-radius: 8px !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,255,136,0.2) !important; }
        .button-primary:hover, .button-hero.button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,255,136,0.4) !important; color: #0a0f1c !important; }
        .button { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.1) !important; border: 2px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.3) !important; color: #00ff88 !important; padding: 10px 20px !important; border-radius: 8px !important; }
        .button:hover { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.2) !important; border-color: #00ff88 !important; color: #00ff88 !important; }
        .form-actions { margin-top: 30px; padding-top: 20px; border-top: 2px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center; }
        .wp-list-table { background: #1a2332 !important; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2) !important; border-radius: 12px !important; }
        .wp-list-table th { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.15) !important; color: #00ff88 !important; font-weight: 700 !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; padding: 18px 20px !important; }
        .wp-list-table td { color: #e5e7eb !important; padding: 16px 20px !important; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.15) !important; }
        .wp-list-table tbody tr:nth-child(odd) { background: rgba(26,35,50,0.9); }
        .wp-list-table tbody tr:nth-child(even) { background: rgba(15,23,32,0.9); }
        .wp-list-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.15) !important; transform: translateX(5px); }
        .status-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; }
        .status-new { background: rgba(59,130,246,0.25); color: #60a5fa; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.4); }
        .status-diagnostic { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.25); color: #fbbf24; border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.4); }
        .status-negotiation { background: rgba(139,92,246,0.25); color: #a78bfa; border: 1px solid rgba(139,92,246,0.4); }
        .status-in_work { background: rgba(249,115,22,0.25); color: #fb923c; border: 1px solid rgba(249,115,22,0.4); }
        .status-completed { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.25); color: #34d399; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.4); }
        .status-rejected { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.25); color: #f87171; border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4); }
        code { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.2); padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; color: #00ff88; font-weight: 700; }
        #vin-decode-result { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.1); border: 2px solid #00ff88; border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; margin-top: 20px; }
        #vin-decode-result h4 { color: #00ff88; margin: 0 0 15px 0; }
        #vin-decode-result p { color: #fff; margin: 8px 0; }
        #form-response { font-weight: bold; margin-left: 20px; font-size: 16px; }
        
        /* Стили парсера */
        .parser-log { background: #0a0f1c; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); border-radius: 8px; padding: 15px; max-height: 500px; overflow-y: auto; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; font-size: 13px; margin-top: 20px; }
        .parser-log-entry { margin: 5px 0; padding: 5px 10px; border-left: 3px solid transparent; }
        .parser-log-entry.info { border-left-color: #3b82f6; color: #93c5fd; }
        .parser-log-entry.success { border-left-color: #10b981; color: #6ee7b7; }
        .parser-log-entry.error { border-left-color: #ef4444; color: #fca5a5; }
        .parser-log-entry.warning { border-left-color: #f59e0b; color: #fcd34d; }
        .parser-log-time { color: #6b7280; margin-right: 10px; }
        .parser-progress { background: #1a2332; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin: 20px 0; }
        .parser-progress-bar { background: #0a0f1c; border-radius: 4px; height: 30px; overflow: hidden; margin: 10px 0; }
        .parser-progress-fill { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00ff88 0%, #00cc6a 100%); height: 100%; width: 0%; transition: width 0.3s; }
        .parser-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 15px; margin-top: 15px; }
        .parser-stat-box { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.1); padding: 10px; border-radius: 6px; text-align: center; }
        .parser-stat-box .label { color: #9ca3af; font-size: 12px; }
        .parser-stat-box .value { color: #00ff88; font-size: 24px; font-weight: bold; }
        </style>
        <?php
    }
    
    public function add_menu_pages() {
        add_menu_page('CRM АКПП', 'CRM', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'), 'dashicons-dashboard', 3);
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Панель', '📊 Панель', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сделки', '📋 Сделки', 'manage_options', 'akpp-deals', array($this, 'render_deals'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Новая сделка', '➕ Новая', 'manage_options', 'akpp-new-deal', array($this, 'render_deal_form'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сотрудники', '👥 Сотрудники', 'manage_options', 'akpp-employees', array($this, 'render_employees'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Авто', '🚗 Авто', 'manage_options', 'akpp-vehicles', array($this, 'render_vehicles'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'АКПП', '⚙️ АКПП', 'manage_options', 'akpp-transmissions', array($this, 'render_transmissions'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Парсер', '🔍 Парсер', 'manage_options', 'akpp-parser', array($this, 'render_parser'));
    }
    
    public function render_dashboard() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $stats = array(
            'total_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table"),
            'active_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status IN ('new', 'diagnostic', 'in_work')"),
            'completed_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'"),
            'total_revenue' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_parts_cost' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_salary' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
        );
        $stats['balance'] = $stats['total_revenue'] - $stats['total_parts_cost'] - $stats['total_salary'];
        
        $recent_deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/dashboard.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deals() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deals.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deal_form() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $deal_id = isset($_GET['id']) ? intval($_GET['id']) : 0;
        $deal = null;
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d",
                $deal_id
            ));
        }
        
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC");
        $brands = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand ASC");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php';
    }
    
    public function render_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees ORDER BY name ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/employees.php';
    }
    
    public function render_vehicles() {
        global $wpdb;
        $vehicles = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand, model, year_from DESC LIMIT 500");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/vehicles.php';
    }
    
    public function render_transmissions() {
        global $wpdb;
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/transmissions.php';
    }
    
    /**
     * Страница парсера
     */
    public function render_parser() {
        global $wpdb;
        $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions");
        ?>
        <div class="wrap akpp-crm-dashboard">
            <h1>🔍 Парсер TransAKPP.ru</h1>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-section">
                <h3>📊 Статистика базы АКПП</h3>
                <div class="akpp-stats-grid" style="grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);">
                    <div class="akpp-stat-card">
                        <div class="stat-content">
                            <h3>Всего АКПП</h3>
                            <p class="stat-number"><?php echo $total; ?></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div class="akpp-form-section">
                <h3>🚀 Запуск парсера</h3>
                <p>Парсер автоматически загрузит все АКПП с сайта transakpp.ru</p>
                
                <div class="parser-progress" id="parser-progress" style="display:none;">
                    <div style="margin-bottom:10px;">
                        <span id="parser-status">Инициализация...</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="parser-progress-bar">
                        <div class="parser-progress-fill" id="parser-fill"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="parser-stats">
                        <div class="parser-stat-box">
                            <div class="label">Обработано</div>
                            <div class="value" id="stat-parsed">0</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="parser-stat-box">
                            <div class="label">Сохранено</div>
                            <div class="value" id="stat-saved">0</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="parser-stat-box">
                            <div class="label">Ошибок</div>
                            <div class="value" id="stat-errors">0</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="parser-log" id="parser-log" style="display:none;"></div>
                
                <div class="form-actions">
                    <button type="button" id="run-parser-btn" class="button button-primary">🚀 Запустить парсер</button>
                    <button type="button" id="clear-db-btn" class="button" style="background: rgba(239,68,68,0.1) !important; border-color: #ef4444 !important; color: #ef4444 !important;">🗑️ Очистить базу</button>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('#run-parser-btn').on('click', function() {
                if (!confirm('Запустить парсер? Это займет несколько минут.')) return;
                
                $('#parser-progress').show();
                $('#parser-log').show().html('');
                $('#run-parser-btn').prop('disabled', true).text('⏳ Парсинг...');
                $('#parser-status').text('🔄 Парсинг запущен...');
                
                $.ajax({
                    url: akppCrm.ajaxUrl,
                    type: 'POST',
                    timeout: 600000,
                    data: {
                        action: 'akpp_run_parser',
                        nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                    },
                    success: function(response) {
                        $('#run-parser-btn').prop('disabled', false).text('🚀 Запустить парсер');
                        
                        if (response.success) {
                            const stats = response.data.stats;
                            const log = response.data.log;
                            
                            $('#stat-parsed').text(stats.parsed);
                            $('#stat-saved').text(stats.saved);
                            $('#stat-errors').text(stats.errors);
                            $('#parser-status').text('✅ Парсинг завершен!');
                            $('#parser-fill').css('width', '100%');
                            
                            // Выводим лог
                            let logHtml = '';
                            log.forEach(function(entry) {
                                logHtml += '<div class="parser-log-entry ' + entry.type + '">';
                                logHtml += '<span class="parser-log-time">[' + entry.time + ']</span>';
                                logHtml += entry.message;
                                logHtml += '</div>';
                            });
                            $('#parser-log').html(logHtml);
                            
                            setTimeout(function() { location.reload(); }, 3000);
                        } else {
                            $('#parser-status').text('❌ Ошибка: ' + response.data.message);
                        }
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        $('#run-parser-btn').prop('disabled', false).text('🚀 Запустить парсер');
                        $('#parser-status').text('❌ Ошибка соединения');
                    }
                });
            });
            
            $('#clear-db-btn').on('click', function() {
                if (!confirm('Очистить всю базу АКПП?')) return;
                
                $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                    action: 'akpp_clear_transmissions_db',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(response) {
                    if (response.success) {
                        alert('✅ ' + response.data.message);
                        location.reload();
                    } else {
                        alert('❌ ' + response.data.message);
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Admin();
```

---

## 📄 3. `inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php` (ДОРАБОТАННЫЙ)

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Deals Management
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 2.1.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Deals {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_deal', array($this, 'save_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deal', array($this, 'get_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_deal', array($this, 'delete_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deals', array($this, 'get_deals'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_models_by_brand', array($this, 'get_models_by_brand'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_vin', array($this, 'decode_vin'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_body_number', array($this, 'decode_body_number'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_transmission_by_vehicle', array($this, 'get_transmission_by_vehicle'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_add_vehicle_to_catalog', array($this, 'add_vehicle_to_catalog'));
    }
    
    public function save_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'client_name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_name'] ?? ''),
            'client_phone' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_phone'] ?? ''),
            'client_vin' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_vin'] ?? '')),
            'client_body_number' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_body_number'] ?? '')),
            'client_plate' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_plate'] ?? '')),
            'car_brand' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_brand'] ?? ''),
            'car_model' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_model'] ?? ''),
            'car_year' => intval($_POST['car_year'] ?? 0),
            'transmission_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? ''),
            'employee_id' => intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0),
            'problem_description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['problem_description'] ?? ''),
            'parts_cost' => floatval($_POST['parts_cost'] ?? 0),
            'employee_payment' => floatval($_POST['employee_payment'] ?? 0),
            'deal_price' => floatval($_POST['deal_price'] ?? 0),
            'status' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? 'new'),
        );
        
        if (!empty($_POST['received_date'])) {
            $data['received_date'] = sanitize_text_field($_POST['received_date']);
        }
        if (!empty($_POST['completed_date'])) {
            $data['completed_date'] = sanitize_text_field($_POST['completed_date']);
        }
        if (!empty($_POST['notes'])) {
            $data['notes'] = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['notes']);
        }
        
        if (empty($data['client_name'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите ФИО клиента'));
        }
        if (empty($data['client_phone'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите телефон клиента'));
        }
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $deal_id));
            
            if ($result !== false) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка обновлена', 'deal_id' => $deal_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка обновления: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
            }
        } else {
            $data['created_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            
            if ($result) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка создана', 'deal_id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка создания: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function get_deals() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? '');
        $search = sanitize_text_field($_POST['search'] ?? '');
        $page = intval($_POST['page'] ?? 1);
        $per_page = 50;
        
        $where = array('1=1');
        $params = array();
        
        if (!empty($status)) {
            $where[] = 'status = %s';
            $params[] = $status;
        }
        
        if (!empty($search)) {
            $where[] = '(client_name LIKE %s OR client_phone LIKE %s OR client_vin LIKE %s)';
            $search_param = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
        }
        
        $where_clause = implode(' AND ', $where);
        
        if (!empty($params)) {
            $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table WHERE $where_clause",
                $params
            ));
        } else {
            $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table");
        }
        
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $per_page;
        
        if (!empty($params)) {
            $params[] = $per_page;
            $params[] = $offset;
            $deals = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM $table WHERE $where_clause ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
                $params
            ));
        } else {
            $deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $per_page OFFSET $offset");
        }
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'deals' => $deals,
            'total' => $total,
            'page' => $page,
            'per_page' => $per_page,
            'pages' => ceil($total / $per_page)
        ));
    }
    
    public function get_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d",
            $deal_id
        ));
        
        if ($deal) {
            wp_send_json_success($deal);
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Сделка не найдена'));
        }
    }
    
    public function delete_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $result = $wpdb->delete($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals', array('id' => $deal_id));
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка удалена'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка удаления'));
        }
    }
    
    public function get_models_by_brand() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не указана марка'));
        }
        
        $models = $wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT DISTINCT model FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles WHERE brand = %s ORDER BY model ASC",
            $brand
        ));
        
        wp_send_json_success($models ?: array());
    }
    
    public function decode_vin() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        $vin = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['vin'] ?? ''));
        
        if (strlen($vin) !== 17) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN должен содержать ровно 17 символов'));
        }
        
        $api_url = "https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/api/vehicles/DecodeVin/{$vin}?format=json";
        
        $response = wp_remote_get($api_url, array(
            'timeout' => 15,
            'user-agent' => 'AKPP45-CRM/1.0'
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка подключения к API: ' . $response->get_error_message()));
        }
        
        $body = wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
        $data = json_decode($body, true);
        
        if (empty($data['Results'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN не распознан'));
        }
        
        $decoded = array();
        foreach ($data['Results'] as $item) {
            $decoded[$item['Variable']] = $item['Value'];
        }
        
        $result = array(
            'vin' => $vin,
            'make' => $decoded['Make'] ?? '',
            'model' => $decoded['Model'] ?? '',
            'year' => $decoded['Model Year'] ?? '',
            'engine' => trim(($decoded['Engine Configuration'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($decoded['Displacement (L)'] ?? '') . 'L'),
            'drive_type' => $decoded['Drive Type'] ?? '',
            'transmission' => $decoded['Transmission Style'] ?? '',
        );
        
        if (!empty($result['make']) && !empty($result['model']) && !empty($result['year'])) {
            $transmission = $this->find_transmission_for_vehicle($result['make'], $result['model'], $result['year']);
            if ($transmission) {
                $result['suggested_transmission'] = $transmission;
            }
        }
        
        wp_send_json_success($result);
    }
    
    public function decode_body_number() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        $body_number = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['body_number'] ?? ''));
        
        if (empty($body_number)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите номер кузова'));
        }
        
        if (preg_match('/^([A-Z]{3})(\d{2,3})[-]?(\d+)$/', $body_number, $matches)) {
            $prefix = $matches[1];
            $model_code = $matches[1] . $matches[2];
            
            $brand = 'Toyota';
            if (in_array($prefix, array('UCF', 'UZS', 'GXF', 'GZS'))) {
                $brand = 'Lexus';
            }
            
            $model = $this->find_model_by_code($model_code);
            $transmission = '';
            
            if ($model) {
                $transmission = $this->find_transmission_for_vehicle($brand, $model, intval($_POST['year'] ?? 0));
            }
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'body_number' => $body_number,
                'model_code' => $model_code,
                'brand' => $brand,
                'model' => $model ?: 'Unknown',
                'suggested_transmission' => $transmission,
            ));
        }
        
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не удалось распознать номер кузова'));
    }
    
    private function find_transmission_for_vehicle($brand, $model, $year) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (empty($brand) || empty($model) || empty($year)) {
            return '';
        }
        
        $transmission = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT transmission_code FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles 
             WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from <= %d 
             AND (year_to >= %d OR year_to IS NULL OR year_to = 0)
             ORDER BY year_from DESC LIMIT 1",
            $brand, $model, $year, $year
        ));
        
        return $transmission ?: '';
    }
    
    private function find_model_by_code($model_code) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $model = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT model FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles WHERE model LIKE %s LIMIT 1",
            '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($model_code) . '%'
        ));
        
        return $model ?: '';
    }
    
    public function add_vehicle_to_catalog() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        $model = sanitize_text_field($_POST['model'] ?? '');
        $year_from = intval($_POST['year_from'] ?? 0);
        $year_to = intval($_POST['year_to'] ?? 0);
        $transmission_code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand) || empty($model)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Марка и модель обязательны'));
        }
        
        $exists = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from = %d",
            $brand, $model, $year_from
        ));
        
        if ($exists) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Модель уже есть в каталоге'));
        }
        
        $data = array(
            'brand' => $brand,
            'model' => $model,
            'year_from' => $year_from ?: 2000,
            'year_to' => $year_to ?: ($year_from ?: 2030),
            'transmission_code' => $transmission_code,
        );
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles', $data);
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Модель "' . $model . '" добавлена в каталог'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка добавления: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
        }
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Deals();
```

---

## 📄 4. ВАЖНО! Доработайте `class-transakpp-parser.php`

Нужно добавить публичный метод для запуска из `class-crm-admin.php`. Откройте `class-transakpp-parser.php` и **добавьте этот метод** в класс:

```php
/**
 * Публичный метод для запуска из админки
 */
public function run_full_parse_public() {
    $this->run_full_parse();
}
```

Добавьте его **внутрь класса** `AKPP_TransAKPP_Parser`, например, после метода `ajax_get_progress()`.

---

## 📄 5. `functions.php` - Убедитесь что подключено

В `functions.php` должно быть:

```php
// CRM система
if (is_admin()) {
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/database.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-crm-deals.php';
    require_once get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/class-transakpp-parser.php';
}
```

---

## 🚀 ЧТО ДЕЛАТЬ:

1. **Замените** `class-crm-admin.php` на новый
2. **Замените** `class-crm-deals.php` на новый
3. **В `class-transakpp-parser.php`** добавьте метод `run_full_parse_public()`
4. **Проверьте** `functions.php` - все файлы должны быть подключены
5. **Зайдите** в CRM → 🔍 Парсер
6. **Нажмите** "🚀 Запустить парсер"

<?php
/**
 * CRM Deals Management
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 2.0.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Deals {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_save_deal', array($this, 'save_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deal', array($this, 'get_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_delete_deal', array($this, 'delete_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_deals', array($this, 'get_deals'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_models_by_brand', array($this, 'get_models_by_brand'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_vin', array($this, 'decode_vin'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_decode_body_number', array($this, 'decode_body_number'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_get_transmission_by_vehicle', array($this, 'get_transmission_by_vehicle'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_add_vehicle_to_catalog', array($this, 'add_vehicle_to_catalog'));
    }
    
    /**
     * Сохранение сделки (создание или обновление)
     */
    public function save_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        $data = array(
            'client_name' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_name'] ?? ''),
            'client_phone' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_phone'] ?? ''),
            'client_vin' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_vin'] ?? '')),
            'client_body_number' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_body_number'] ?? '')),
            'client_plate' => strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['client_plate'] ?? '')),
            'car_brand' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_brand'] ?? ''),
            'car_model' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['car_model'] ?? ''),
            'car_year' => intval($_POST['car_year'] ?? 0),
            'transmission_code' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? ''),
            'employee_id' => intval($_POST['employee_id'] ?? 0),
            'problem_description' => sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['problem_description'] ?? ''),
            'parts_cost' => floatval($_POST['parts_cost'] ?? 0),
            'employee_payment' => floatval($_POST['employee_payment'] ?? 0),
            'deal_price' => floatval($_POST['deal_price'] ?? 0),
            'status' => sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? 'new'),
        );
        
        // Обработка дат
        if (!empty($_POST['received_date'])) {
            $data['received_date'] = sanitize_text_field($_POST['received_date']);
        }
        if (!empty($_POST['completed_date'])) {
            $data['completed_date'] = sanitize_text_field($_POST['completed_date']);
        }
        if (!empty($_POST['notes'])) {
            $data['notes'] = sanitize_textarea_field($_POST['notes']);
        }
        
        // Валидация обязательных полей
        if (empty($data['client_name'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите ФИО клиента'));
        }
        if (empty($data['client_phone'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите телефон клиента'));
        }
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            // Обновление существующей сделки
            $data['updated_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->update($table, $data, array('id' => $deal_id));
            
            if ($result !== false) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка обновлена', 'deal_id' => $deal_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка обновления: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
            }
        } else {
            // Создание новой сделки
            $data['created_at'] = current_time('mysql');
            $result = $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
            
            if ($result) {
                wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка создана', 'deal_id' => $wpdb->insert_id));
            } else {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка создания: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Получение списка сделок с фильтрацией и пагинацией
     */
    public function get_deals() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $status = sanitize_text_field($_POST['status'] ?? '');
        $search = sanitize_text_field($_POST['search'] ?? '');
        $page = intval($_POST['page'] ?? 1);
        $per_page = 50;
        
        $where = array('1=1');
        $params = array();
        
        if (!empty($status)) {
            $where[] = 'status = %s';
            $params[] = $status;
        }
        
        if (!empty($search)) {
            $where[] = '(client_name LIKE %s OR client_phone LIKE %s OR client_vin LIKE %s)';
            $search_param = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
            $params[] = $search_param;
        }
        
        $where_clause = implode(' AND ', $where);
        
        $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $table WHERE $where_clause",
            $params
        ));
        
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $per_page;
        $params[] = $per_page;
        $params[] = $offset;
        
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table WHERE $where_clause ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
            $params
        ));
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'deals' => $deals,
            'total' => $total,
            'page' => $page,
            'per_page' => $per_page,
            'pages' => ceil($total / $per_page)
        ));
    }
    
    /**
     * Получение одной сделки по ID
     */
    public function get_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM $table WHERE id = %d",
            $deal_id
        ));
        
        if ($deal) {
            wp_send_json_success($deal);
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Сделка не найдена'));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Удаление сделки
     */
    public function delete_deal() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $deal_id = intval($_POST['deal_id'] ?? 0);
        
        if ($deal_id <= 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Неверный ID'));
        }
        
        $result = $wpdb->delete($table, array('id' => $deal_id));
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Сделка удалена'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка удаления'));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Получение моделей по марке автомобиля
     */
    public function get_models_by_brand() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не указана марка'));
        }
        
        $models = $wpdb->get_col($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT DISTINCT model FROM $table WHERE brand = %s ORDER BY model ASC",
            $brand
        ));
        
        if ($wpdb->last_error) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка БД: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
        }
        
        wp_send_json_success($models);
    }
    
    /**
     * Декодирование VIN номера через NHTSA API
     */
    public function decode_vin() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        $vin = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['vin'] ?? ''));
        
        if (strlen($vin) !== 17) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN должен содержать ровно 17 символов'));
        }
        
        // Запрос к NHTSA API
        $api_url = "https://vpic.nhtsa.dot.gov/api/vehicles/DecodeVin/{$vin}?format=json";
        
        $response = wp_remote_get($api_url, array(
            'timeout' => 15,
            'user-agent' => 'AKPP45-CRM/1.0'
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка подключения к API: ' . $response->get_error_message()));
        }
        
        $body = wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
        $data = json_decode($body, true);
        
        if (empty($data['Results'])) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'VIN не распознан'));
        }
        
        // Извлекаем нужные данные из ответа
        $decoded = array();
        foreach ($data['Results'] as $item) {
            $decoded[$item['Variable']] = $item['Value'];
        }
        
        // Формируем ответ
        $result = array(
            'vin' => $vin,
            'make' => $decoded['Make'] ?? '',
            'model' => $decoded['Model'] ?? '',
            'year' => $decoded['Model Year'] ?? '',
            'engine' => ($decoded['Engine Configuration'] ?? '') . ' ' . ($decoded['Displacement (L)'] ?? '') . 'L',
            'drive_type' => $decoded['Drive Type'] ?? '',
            'transmission' => $decoded['Transmission Style'] ?? '',
        );
        
        // Пытаемся найти подходящую АКПП в базе
        if (!empty($result['make']) && !empty($result['model']) && !empty($result['year'])) {
            $transmission = $this->find_transmission_for_vehicle($result['make'], $result['model'], $result['year']);
            if ($transmission) {
                $result['suggested_transmission'] = $transmission;
            }
        }
        
        wp_send_json_success($result);
    }
    
    /**
     * Декодирование номера кузова (Toyota/Lexus формат)
     */
    public function decode_body_number() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        $body_number = strtoupper(sanitize_text_field($_POST['body_number'] ?? ''));
        
        if (empty($body_number)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Введите номер кузова'));
        }
        
        // Парсинг формата Toyota/Lexus: XXX##-######
        // Например: JZX100-1234567, JTJGA31U260012345
        if (preg_match('/^([A-Z]{3})(\d{2,3})[-]?(\d+)$/', $body_number, $matches)) {
            $prefix = $matches[1];
            $model_code = $matches[1] . $matches[2];
            $serial = $matches[3];
            
            // Определяем марку по префиксу
            $brand = 'Toyota';
            if (in_array($prefix, array('JZX', 'JZS', 'UCF', 'UZS', 'GXS', 'GZS'))) {
                $brand = 'Toyota';
            } elseif (in_array($prefix, array('UCF', 'UZS', 'GXF', 'GZS'))) {
                $brand = 'Lexus';
            }
            
            // Пытаемся найти модель в базе
            $model = $this->find_model_by_code($model_code);
            
            // Ищем подходящую АКПП
            $transmission = '';
            if ($model && !empty($_POST['year'])) {
                $transmission = $this->find_transmission_for_vehicle($brand, $model, intval($_POST['year']));
            }
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'body_number' => $body_number,
                'model_code' => $model_code,
                'brand' => $brand,
                'model' => $model ?: 'Unknown',
                'suggested_transmission' => $transmission,
            ));
        }
        
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Не удалось распознать номер кузова. Формат: XXX##-######'));
    }
    
    /**
     * Поиск АКПП для автомобиля по марке, модели и году
     */
    private function find_transmission_for_vehicle($brand, $model, $year) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        $transmission = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT transmission_code FROM $table 
             WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from <= %d 
             AND (year_to >= %d OR year_to IS NULL OR year_to = 0)
             ORDER BY year_from DESC LIMIT 1",
            $brand, $model, $year, $year
        ));
        
        return $transmission ?: '';
    }
    
    /**
     * Поиск модели по коду кузова
     */
    private function find_model_by_code($model_code) {
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        // Ищем по частичному совпадению кода модели
        $model = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT model FROM $table WHERE model LIKE %s LIMIT 1",
            '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($model_code) . '%'
        ));
        
        return $model ?: '';
    }
    
    /**
     * Добавление автомобиля в каталог
     */
    public function add_vehicle_to_catalog() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Недостаточно прав'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_vehicles';
        
        $brand = sanitize_text_field($_POST['brand'] ?? '');
        $model = sanitize_text_field($_POST['model'] ?? '');
        $year_from = intval($_POST['year_from'] ?? 0);
        $year_to = intval($_POST['year_to'] ?? 0);
        $transmission_code = sanitize_text_field($_POST['transmission_code'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($brand) || empty($model)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Марка и модель обязательны'));
        }
        
        // Проверяем, есть ли уже такая запись
        $exists = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT id FROM $table WHERE brand = %s AND model = %s AND year_from = %d",
            $brand, $model, $year_from
        ));
        
        if ($exists) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Модель уже есть в каталоге'));
        }
        
        $data = array(
            'brand' => $brand,
            'model' => $model,
            'year_from' => $year_from,
            'year_to' => $year_to ?: $year_from,
            'transmission_code' => $transmission_code,
        );
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert($table, $data);
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Модель "' . $model . '" добавлена в каталог'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Ошибка добавления: ' . $wpdb->last_error));
        }
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Deals();

и вот что у нас class-crm-admin
.php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Admin Pages - С AJAX ОБРАБОТЧИКОМ ДЛЯ ПАРСЕРА
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 3.1.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Admin {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_menu_pages'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'add_inline_styles'), 999);
        
        // AJAX обработчики для парсера
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_clear_transmissions_db', array($this, 'ajax_clear_db'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_import_transmissions', array($this, 'ajax_import_transmissions'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Очистка базы АКПП
     */
    public function ajax_clear_db() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_transmissions';
        
        $wpdb->query("TRUNCATE TABLE $table");
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'База очищена'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Импорт АКПП (заглушка для парсера)
     */
    public function ajax_import_transmissions() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        // Здесь будет логика парсинга
        // Пока заглушка
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'Импорт начат',
            'count' => 0
        ));
    }
