```php
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_Telegram_CRM_Bot {
    
    private $bot_token = '';
    private $webhook_url = '';
    private $authorized_users = array();
    
    public function __construct() {
        $this->bot_token = trim(get_option('akpp_telegram_bot_token', ''));
        $this->webhook_url = admin_url('admin-ajax.php?action=akpp_telegram_crm_webhook');
        
        // Безопасная загрузка авторизованных пользователей
        $users_option = get_option('akpp_telegram_authorized_users', '');
        if (is_array($users_option)) {
            $this->authorized_users = array_filter(array_map('trim', $users_option));
        } elseif (is_string($users_option) && !empty($users_option)) {
            $this->authorized_users = array_filter(array_map('trim', explode("\n", $users_option)));
        } else {
            $this->authorized_users = array();
        }
        
        // Хуки
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_settings_page'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'register_settings'));
        
        // Webhook для Telegram (должен быть доступен без авторизации)
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_telegram_crm_webhook', array($this, 'handle_webhook'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_akpp_telegram_crm_webhook', array($this, 'handle_webhook'));
        
        // Автоматическая установка webhook при сохранении токена
        if (!empty($this->bot_token)) {
            $webhook_set = get_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set', false);
            if (!$webhook_set) {
                add_action('init', array($this, 'setup_webhook'));
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Настройка webhook
     */
    public function setup_webhook() {
        if (empty($this->bot_token)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $response = wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$this->bot_token}/setWebhook", array(
            'timeout' => 15,
            'body' => array(
                'url' => $this->webhook_url,
                'allowed_updates' => array('message', 'callback_query'),
            ),
        ));
        
        if (!is_wp_error($response)) {
            $body = wp_remote_retrieve_body($response);
            $result = json_decode($body, true);
            if (isset($result['ok']) && $result['ok']) {
                update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set', true);
                update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_status', 'active');
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_status', 'error');
        return false;
    }
    
    /**
     * Регистрация настроек
     */
    public function register_settings() {
        register_setting('akpp_telegram_crm', 'akpp_telegram_bot_token');
        register_setting('akpp_telegram_crm', 'akpp_telegram_authorized_users');
        register_setting('akpp_telegram_crm', 'akpp_telegram_notify_chat');
    }
    
    /**

            '📱 Telegram CRM',

            'akpp-telegram-crm',
            array($this, 'render_settings_page')
        );
    }

                                   placeholder="123456:ABC-DEF1234ghIkl-zyx57W2v1u129ew11"

        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('#test-connection-btn').on('click', function() {
                const btn = $(this);
                const result = $('#test-result');
                btn.prop('disabled', true).text('⏳ Проверка...');

                    action: 'akpp_telegram_setup_webhook',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(response) {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔄 Переустановить Webhook');
                    if (response.success) {
                        result.css('color', '#10b981').text('✅ ' + response.data.message);
                        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
                    } else {
                        result.css('color', '#ef4444').text('❌ ' + response.data.message);
                    }
                });
            });

    /**
     * Обработка webhook от Telegram
     */
    public function handle_webhook() {
        $input = file_get_contents('php://input');
        if (empty($input)) {
            wp_die();
        }
        
        $update = json_decode($input, true);
        if (empty($update)) {
            wp_die();
        }
        
        // Обработка callback query (кнопки)
        if (isset($update['callback_query'])) {
            $this->handle_callback($update['callback_query']);
            wp_die();
        }
        
        // Обработка сообщений
        if (isset($update['message'])) {
            $this->handle_message($update['message']);
        }
        
        wp_die();
    }
    
    /**
     * Обработка входящего сообщения
     */
    private function handle_message($message) {
        $chat_id = $message['chat']['id'] ?? 0;
        $text = trim($message['text'] ?? '');
        
        if (empty($chat_id) || empty($text)) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Проверка авторизации
        if (!in_array((string)$chat_id, $this->authorized_users)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ У вас нет доступа к CRM.\n\nВаш ID: `{$chat_id}`\nДобавьте его в настройках.");
            return;
        }
        
        // Парсинг команд
        if (strpos($text, '/') === 0) {
            $parts = preg_split('/\s+/', $text);
            $command = strtolower($parts[0]);
            $args = array_slice($parts, 1);
            
            switch ($command) {
                case '/start':
                    $this->cmd_start($chat_id);
                    break;
                case '/newlead':
                    $this->cmd_new_lead($chat_id, $args);
                    break;
                case '/newdeal':
                    $this->cmd_new_deal($chat_id, $args);
                    break;
                case '/deals':
                    $this->cmd_deals($chat_id, $args);
                    break;
                case '/leads':
                    $this->cmd_leads($chat_id, $args);
                    break;
                case '/stats':
                    $this->cmd_stats($chat_id);
                    break;
                case '/search':
                    $this->cmd_search($chat_id, $args);
                    break;
                case '/help':
                    $this->cmd_help($chat_id);
                    break;
                default:
                    $this->send_message($chat_id, "❓ Неизвестная команда. Используйте /help");
            }
        } else {
            // Быстрое создание лида из текста
            if (preg_match('/\+?7?\d{10,11}/', $text)) {
                $this->create_lead_from_text($chat_id, $text);
            }
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Обработка callback query
     */
    private function handle_callback($callback) {
        $chat_id = $callback['message']['chat']['id'] ?? 0;
        $data = $callback['data'] ?? '';
        
        if (empty($chat_id)) {
            return;
        }
        
        $parts = explode(':', $data);
        $action = $parts[0] ?? '';
        $id = $parts[1] ?? '';
        $extra = $parts[2] ?? '';
        
        switch ($action) {
            case 'lead_convert':
                $this->convert_lead($id, $chat_id);
                break;
            case 'lead_reject':
                $this->update_lead_status($id, 'rejected', $chat_id);
                break;
            case 'deal_status':
                $this->update_deal_status($id, $extra, $chat_id);
                break;
            case 'deals_page':
                $this->cmd_deals($chat_id, array($id));
                break;
            case 'leads_page':
                $this->cmd_leads($chat_id, array($id));
                break;
        }
        
        // Ответ на callback
        wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$this->bot_token}/answerCallbackQuery", array(
            'body' => array('callback_query_id' => $callback['id']),
            'timeout' => 5,
        ));
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /start
     */
    private function cmd_start($chat_id) {
        $text = "👋 *Добро пожаловать в AKPP CRM!*\n\n";
        $text .= "📱 *Команды:*\n";
        $text .= "/newlead - Создать лид\n";
        $text .= "/newdeal - Создать сделку\n";
        $text .= "/deals - Список сделок\n";
        $text .= "/leads - Список лидов\n";
        $text .= "/stats - Статистика\n";
        $text .= "/search [текст] - Поиск\n";
        $text .= "/help - Помощь\n\n";
        $text .= "💡 *Совет:* Просто отправьте номер телефона - создастся лид!";
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /newlead
     */
    private function cmd_new_lead($chat_id, $args) {
        if (!empty($args)) {
            $text = implode(' ', $args);
            $this->create_lead_from_text($chat_id, $text);
            return;
        }
        
        $text = "📝 *Создание лида*\n\n";
        $text .= "Формат:\n`/newlead [телефон] [имя] [авто]`\n\n";
        $text .= "Пример:\n`/newlead +79991234567 Иван Toyota Camry`";
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /newdeal
     */
    private function cmd_new_deal($chat_id, $args) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (count($args) < 2) {
            $text = "❌ *Недостаточно данных*\n\n";
            $text .= "Формат:\n`/newdeal [телефон] [имя] [авто]`\n\n";
            $text .= "Пример:\n`/newdeal +79991234567 Иван Toyota Camry`";
            $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
            return;
        }
        
        $phone = sanitize_text_field($args[0]);
        $name = sanitize_text_field($args[1]);
        $vehicle = sanitize_text_field(implode(' ', array_slice($args, 2)));
        
        $deal_data = array(
            'client_name' => $name,
            'client_phone' => $phone,
            'client_vin' => '',
            'client_body_number' => '',
            'client_plate' => '',
            'car_brand' => '',
            'car_model' => $vehicle,
            'car_year' => 0,
            'transmission_code' => '',
            'employee_id' => 0,
            'problem_description' => '',
            'parts_cost' => 0,
            'employee_payment' => 0,
            'deal_price' => 0,
            'status' => 'new',
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals', $deal_data);
        
        if ($result) {
            $deal_id = $wpdb->insert_id;
            $text = "✅ *Сделка создана!*\n\n";
            $text .= "ID: #{$deal_id}\n";
            $text .= "👤 Клиент: {$name}\n";
            $text .= "📞 Телефон: {$phone}\n";
            $text .= "🚗 Авто: {$vehicle}";
            $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
            
            $this->notify_admins("🆕 *Новая сделка #{$deal_id}*\n👤 {$name}\n📞 {$phone}");
        } else {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Ошибка создания сделки: " . $wpdb->last_error);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /deals
     */
    private function cmd_deals($chat_id, $args) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $page = max(1, intval($args[0] ?? 1));
        $per_page = 5;
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $per_page;
        
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
            $per_page, $offset
        ));
        
        $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals");
        $pages = max(1, ceil($total / $per_page));
        
        if (empty($deals)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "📭 Сделок пока нет");
            return;
        }
        
        $text = "📋 *Сделки* (стр. {$page}/{$pages})\n\n";
        
        foreach ($deals as $deal) {
            $emoji = $this->get_status_emoji($deal->status);
            $text .= "{$emoji} *#{$deal->id}* - {$deal->client_name}\n";
            $text .= "📞 {$deal->client_phone}\n";
            if (!empty($deal->car_brand) || !empty($deal->car_model)) {
                $text .= "🚗 " . trim($deal->car_brand . ' ' . $deal->car_model) . "\n";
            }
            $text .= "💰 " . number_format((float)$deal->deal_price, 0, ',', ' ') . " ₽\n\n";
        }
        
        $keyboard = array();
        $nav_row = array();
        if ($page > 1) {
            $nav_row[] = array('text' => '⬅️ Назад', 'callback_data' => "deals_page:" . ($page - 1));
        }
        if ($page < $pages) {
            $nav_row[] = array('text' => 'Вперёд ➡️', 'callback_data' => "deals_page:" . ($page + 1));
        }
        if (!empty($nav_row)) {
            $keyboard[] = $nav_row;
        }
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text, $keyboard);
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /leads
     */
    private function cmd_leads($chat_id, $args) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $page = max(1, intval($args[0] ?? 1));
        $per_page = 5;
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $per_page;
        
        $leads = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_leads ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT %d OFFSET %d",
            $per_page, $offset
        ));
        
        $total = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_leads");
        $pages = max(1, ceil($total / $per_page));
        
        if (empty($leads)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "📭 Лидов пока нет");
            return;
        }
        
        foreach ($leads as $lead) {
            $emoji = $this->get_lead_status_emoji($lead->status);
            $text = "{$emoji} *Лид #{$lead->id}*\n";
            $text .= "👤 " . ($lead->name ?: '—') . "\n";
            $text .= "📞 " . ($lead->phone ?: '—') . "\n";
            if (!empty($lead->vehicle_info)) {
                $text .= "🚗 {$lead->vehicle_info}\n";
            }
            $text .= "📅 " . date('d.m.Y H:i', strtotime($lead->created_at));
            
            $keyboard = array();
            if ($lead->status !== 'converted' && $lead->status !== 'rejected') {
                $keyboard[] = array(
                    array('text' => '✅ В сделку', 'callback_data' => "lead_convert:{$lead->id}"),
                    array('text' => '❌ Отказ', 'callback_data' => "lead_reject:{$lead->id}"),
                );
            }
            
            $this->send_message($chat_id, $text, $keyboard);
        }
        
        // Навигация
        $nav_row = array();
        if ($page > 1) {
            $nav_row[] = array('text' => '⬅️ Назад', 'callback_data' => "leads_page:" . ($page - 1));
        }
        if ($page < $pages) {
            $nav_row[] = array('text' => 'Вперёд ➡️', 'callback_data' => "leads_page:" . ($page + 1));
        }
        if (!empty($nav_row)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "_Стр. {$page}/{$pages}_", array($nav_row));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /stats
     */
    private function cmd_stats($chat_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $total_deals = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals");
        $active_deals = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status IN ('new', 'in_work')");
        $completed_deals = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'");
        $total_revenue = (float) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE status = 'completed'");
        
        $total_leads = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_leads");
        $converted_leads = (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_leads WHERE status = 'converted'");
        
        $text = "📊 *Статистика CRM*\n\n";
        $text .= "📋 *Сделки:*\n";
        $text .= "Всего: {$total_deals}\n";
        $text .= "Активных: {$active_deals}\n";
        $text .= "Завершено: {$completed_deals}\n";
        $text .= "💰 Выручка: " . number_format($total_revenue, 0, ',', ' ') . " ₽\n\n";
        
        $text .= "🎯 *Лиды:*\n";
        $text .= "Всего: {$total_leads}\n";
        $text .= "Конвертировано: {$converted_leads}\n";
        $conversion_rate = $total_leads > 0 ? round(($converted_leads / $total_leads) * 100, 1) : 0;
        $text .= "📈 Конверсия: {$conversion_rate}%";
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /search
     */
    private function cmd_search($chat_id, $args) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (empty($args)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Введите текст:\n`/search [текст]`");
            return;
        }
        
        $search = implode(' ', $args);
        $like = '%' . $wpdb->esc_like($search) . '%';
        
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals 
             WHERE client_name LIKE %s OR client_phone LIKE %s OR car_brand LIKE %s OR car_model LIKE %s
             LIMIT 10",
            $like, $like, $like, $like
        ));
        
        if (empty($deals)) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "🔍 Ничего не найдено по запросу: *{$search}*");
            return;
        }
        
        $text = "🔍 *Результаты:* \"{$search}\"\n\n";
        foreach ($deals as $deal) {
            $text .= "#{$deal->id} - {$deal->client_name}\n";
            $text .= "📞 {$deal->client_phone}\n";
            if (!empty($deal->car_brand) || !empty($deal->car_model)) {
                $text .= "🚗 " . trim($deal->car_brand . ' ' . $deal->car_model) . "\n";
            }
            $text .= "\n";
        }
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
    }
    
    /**
     * Команда /help
     */
    private function cmd_help($chat_id) {
        $text = "📖 *Помощь по Telegram CRM*\n\n";
        $text .= "*Команды:*\n";
        $text .= "/start - Начать\n";
        $text .= "/newlead [телефон] [имя] - Лид\n";
        $text .= "/newdeal [телефон] [имя] [авто] - Сделка\n";
        $text .= "/deals - Список сделок\n";
        $text .= "/leads - Список лидов\n";
        $text .= "/stats - Статистика\n";
        $text .= "/search [текст] - Поиск\n\n";
        $text .= "*Быстрый лид:*\n";
        $text .= "Просто отправьте номер телефона!";
        
        $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
    }
    
    /**
     * Создание лида из текста
     */
    private function create_lead_from_text($chat_id, $text) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        preg_match('/(\+?7?\d{10,11})/', $text, $phone_match);
        $phone = $phone_match[0] ?? '';
        
        $name = 'Клиент';
        if (preg_match('/\d+\s+([А-Яа-яЁёA-Za-z]+)/u', $text, $name_match)) {
            $name = $name_match[1];
        }
        
        $vehicle = '';
        if (preg_match('/(Toyota|Lexus|Mazda|Honda|Nissan|BMW|Mercedes|Audi|Volkswagen|Hyundai|Kia|Ford|Chevrolet|Kia|Reno)\s+([А-Яа-яA-Za-z0-9\s]+)/ui', $text, $car_match)) {
            $vehicle = $car_match[0];
        }
        
        $lead_data = array(
            'source' => 'telegram',
            'name' => sanitize_text_field($name),
            'phone' => sanitize_text_field($phone),
            'vehicle_info' => sanitize_text_field($vehicle),
            'message' => sanitize_textarea_field($text),
            'status' => 'new',
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_leads', $lead_data);
        
        if ($result) {
            $lead_id = $wpdb->insert_id;
            $msg = "✅ *Лид создан!*\n\n";
            $msg .= "ID: #{$lead_id}\n";
            $msg .= "👤 Имя: {$lead_data['name']}\n";
            $msg .= "📞 Телефон: {$lead_data['phone']}\n";
            $msg .= "🚗 Авто: " . ($lead_data['vehicle_info'] ?: '—');
            $this->send_message($chat_id, $msg);
            
            $this->notify_admins("🆕 *Новый лид #{$lead_id}*\n👤 {$lead_data['name']}\n📞 {$lead_data['phone']}");
        } else {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Ошибка создания лида");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Конвертация лида в сделку
     */
    private function convert_lead($lead_id, $chat_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $lead = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_leads WHERE id = %d",
            intval($lead_id)
        ));
        
        if (!$lead) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Лид не найден");
            return;
        }
        
        $vehicle_parts = explode(' ', $lead->vehicle_info ?: '');
        $brand = $vehicle_parts[0] ?? '';
        $model = $vehicle_parts[1] ?? '';
        
        $deal_data = array(
            'client_name' => $lead->name,
            'client_phone' => $lead->phone,
            'client_vin' => '',
            'client_body_number' => '',
            'client_plate' => '',
            'car_brand' => $brand,
            'car_model' => $model,
            'car_year' => 0,
            'transmission_code' => $lead->transmission_code ?: '',
            'employee_id' => 0,
            'problem_description' => $lead->message ?: '',
            'parts_cost' => 0,
            'employee_payment' => 0,
            'deal_price' => 0,
            'status' => 'in_work',
            'notes' => 'Создано из Telegram (лид #' . $lead_id . ')',
            'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
        );
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert($wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals', $deal_data);
        
        if ($result) {
            $deal_id = $wpdb->insert_id;
            
            $wpdb->update(
                $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_leads',
                array('status' => 'converted', 'deal_id' => $deal_id),
                array('id' => intval($lead_id))
            );
            
            $text = "✅ *Лид конвертирован!*\n\n";
            $text .= "Лид #{$lead_id} → Сделка #{$deal_id}\n";
            $text .= "🔧 Статус: В работе";
            $this->send_message($chat_id, $text);
            
            $this->notify_admins("✅ Лид #{$lead_id} → Сделка #{$deal_id}");
        } else {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Ошибка создания сделки");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Обновление статуса лида
     */
    private function update_lead_status($lead_id, $status, $chat_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $result = $wpdb->update(
            $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_leads',
            array('status' => $status),
            array('id' => intval($lead_id))
        );
        
        if ($result !== false) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "✅ Лид #{$lead_id}: статус → {$status}");
        } else {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Ошибка обновления");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Обновление статуса сделки
     */
    private function update_deal_status($deal_id, $new_status, $chat_id) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $result = $wpdb->update(
            $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals',
            array('status' => $new_status),
            array('id' => intval($deal_id))
        );
        
        if ($result !== false) {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "✅ Сделка #{$deal_id}: статус → {$new_status}");
        } else {
            $this->send_message($chat_id, "❌ Ошибка обновления");
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Уведомление админам
     */
    private function notify_admins($message) {
        $notify_chat = get_option('akpp_telegram_notify_chat', '');
        if (!empty($notify_chat)) {
            $this->send_message($notify_chat, $message);
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * Отправка сообщения в Telegram
     */
    private function send_message($chat_id, $text, $keyboard = array()) {
        if (empty($this->bot_token) || empty($chat_id)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        $data = array(
            'chat_id' => $chat_id,
            'text' => $text,
            'parse_mode' => 'Markdown',
        );
        
        if (!empty($keyboard)) {
            $data['reply_markup'] = json_encode(array('inline_keyboard' => $keyboard));
        }
        
        $response = wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$this->bot_token}/sendMessage", array(
            'body' => $data,
            'timeout' => 10,
        ));
        
        return !is_wp_error($response);
    }
    
    /**
     * Эмодзи статуса сделки
     */
    private function get_status_emoji($status) {
        $emojis = array(
            'new' => '🆕',
            'diagnostic' => '🔍',
            'negotiation' => '💬',
            'in_work' => '🔧',
            'completed' => '✅',
            'rejected' => '❌',
        );
        return $emojis[$status] ?? '📋';
    }
    
    /**
     * Эмодзи статуса лида
     */
    private function get_lead_status_emoji($status) {
        $emojis = array(
            'new' => '🆕',
            'contacted' => '📞',
            'interested' => '💡',
            'negotiation' => '💬',
            'converted' => '✅',
            'rejected' => '❌',
            'cold' => '🧊',
        );
        return $emojis[$status] ?? '🎯';
    }
}

new AKPP_Telegram_CRM_Bot();
```

## 📄 Дополнительно — добавьте AJAX обработчики в `class-crm-admin.php`

В конструктор класса `AKPP_CRM_Admin` добавьте:

```php
add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_telegram_test_connection', array($this, 'ajax_telegram_test'));
add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_telegram_setup_webhook', array($this, 'ajax_telegram_webhook'));
```

И методы:

```php
public function ajax_telegram_test() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
    if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
    
    $token = get_option('akpp_telegram_bot_token', '');
    if (empty($token)) wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Bot Token не задан'));
    
    $response = wp_remote_get("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$token}/getMe", array('timeout' => 15));
    
    if (is_wp_error($response)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $response->get_error_message()));
    }
    
    $body = json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($response), true);
    if (isset($body['ok']) && $body['ok']) {
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => "Бот @{$body['result']['username']} работает!"));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $body['description'] ?? 'Неизвестная ошибка'));
    }
}

public function ajax_telegram_webhook() {
    check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
    if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
    
    delete_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set');
    
    $token = get_option('akpp_telegram_bot_token', '');
    if (empty($token)) wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Bot Token не задан'));
    
    $url = admin_url('admin-ajax.php?action=akpp_telegram_crm_webhook');
    $response = wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$token}/setWebhook", array(
        'body' => array('url' => $url),
        'timeout' => 15,
    ));
    
    if (is_wp_error($response)) {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $response->get_error_message()));
    }
    
    $body = json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($response), true);
    if (isset($body['ok']) && $body['ok']) {
        update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set', true);
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Webhook установлен!'));
    } else {
        wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $body['description'] ?? 'Ошибка'));
    }
}
```

## ✅ Что исправлено:

1. ✅ **Защита от ошибок** при загрузке `authorized_users` (поддержка и массива, и строки)
2. ✅ **Проверки `empty()`** во всех ключевых местах
3. ✅ **Безопасный `file_get_contents('php://input')`** вместо прямого обращения
4. ✅ **Проверка существования** полей в массиве Telegram update
5. ✅ **Корректная работа** если опции ещё не заданы
6. ✅ **Все AJAX обработчики** для тестирования и настройки webhook

### USER
Дополнительно — добавьте AJAX обработчики в class-crm-admin.php
Дай готовый

### ASSISTANT
# 📄 Готовый `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php`

```php
<?php
/**
 * CRM Admin Pages
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 3.3.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class AKPP_CRM_Admin {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_menu_pages'));
        add_action('admin_head', array($this, 'add_inline_styles'), 999);
        
        // AJAX обработчики для парсера
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_clear_transmissions_db', array($this, 'ajax_clear_db'));
        
        // AJAX обработчики для Telegram CRM
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_telegram_test_connection', array($this, 'ajax_telegram_test'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_telegram_setup_webhook', array($this, 'ajax_telegram_webhook'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Очистка базы АКПП
     */
    public function ajax_clear_db() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        $wpdb->query("TRUNCATE TABLE {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions");
        
        wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'База АКПП очищена'));
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Тест подключения к Telegram
     */
    public function ajax_telegram_test() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $token = get_option('akpp_telegram_bot_token', '');
        $chat = get_option('akpp_telegram_notify_chat', '');
        
        if (empty($token)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Bot Token не задан в настройках'));
        }
        
        // Проверяем бота
        $response = wp_remote_get("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$token}/getMe", array(
            'timeout' => 15,
            'sslverify' => false,
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            $error = $response->get_error_message();
            if (strpos($error, 'cURL error 28') !== false) {
                wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Таймаут. Telegram заблокирован на хостинге. Настройте прокси.'));
            }
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $error));
        }
        
        $body = json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($response), true);
        
        if (isset($body['ok']) && $body['ok']) {
            $bot_name = $body['result']['username'] ?? 'unknown';
            $bot_id = $body['result']['id'] ?? '';
            
            // Если есть chat_id - отправляем тестовое сообщение
            $chat_status = '';
            if (!empty($chat)) {
                $msg_response = wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$token}/sendMessage", array(
                    'body' => array(
                        'chat_id' => $chat,
                        'text' => "✅ *Тест подключения АКПП45 CRM*\n\n🤖 Бот: @{$bot_name}\n📅 " . current_time('d.m.Y H:i') . "\n " . home_url(),
                        'parse_mode' => 'Markdown',
                    ),
                    'timeout' => 10,
                    'sslverify' => false,
                ));
                
                if (is_wp_error($msg_response)) {
                    $chat_status = '⚠️ Сообщение не отправлено: ' . $msg_response->get_error_message();
                } else {
                    $msg_body = json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($msg_response), true);
                    $chat_status = isset($msg_body['ok']) && $msg_body['ok'] 
                        ? '✅ Сообщение отправлено в чат' 
                        : '❌ Ошибка: ' . ($msg_body['description'] ?? 'неизвестно');
                }
            } else {
                $chat_status = '⚠️ Chat ID не задан';
            }
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'message' => "Бот @{$bot_name} (ID: {$bot_id}) работает!\n{$chat_status}"
            ));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $body['description'] ?? 'Неизвестная ошибка'));
        }
    }
    
    /**
     * AJAX: Установка webhook Telegram
     */
    public function ajax_telegram_webhook() {
        check_ajax_referer('akpp_crm_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Нет доступа'));
        }
        
        $token = get_option('akpp_telegram_bot_token', '');
        
        if (empty($token)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Bot Token не задан'));
        }
        
        // Сбрасываем флаг установки
        delete_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set');
        
        $webhook_url = admin_url('admin-ajax.php?action=akpp_telegram_crm_webhook');
        
        $response = wp_remote_post("https://api.telegram.org/bot{$token}/setWebhook", array(
            'body' => array(
                'url' => $webhook_url,
                'allowed_updates' => json_encode(array('message', 'callback_query')),
            ),
            'timeout' => 15,
            'sslverify' => false,
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $response->get_error_message()));
        }
        
        $body = json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($response), true);
        
        if (isset($body['ok']) && $body['ok']) {
            update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_set', true);
            update_option('akpp_telegram_webhook_status', 'active');
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Webhook установлен: ' . $webhook_url));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => $body['description'] ?? 'Ошибка установки webhook'));
        }
    }

    /**
     * Меню CRM
     */
    public function add_menu_pages() {
        add_menu_page('CRM АКПП', 'CRM', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'), 'dashicons-dashboard', 3);
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Панель', '📊 Панель', 'manage_options', 'akpp-crm', array($this, 'render_dashboard'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сделки', '📋 Сделки', 'manage_options', 'akpp-deals', array($this, 'render_deals'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Новая сделка', '➕ Новая', 'manage_options', 'akpp-new-deal', array($this, 'render_deal_form'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Сотрудники', '👥 Сотрудники', 'manage_options', 'akpp-employees', array($this, 'render_employees'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Авто', '🚗 Авто', 'manage_options', 'akpp-vehicles', array($this, 'render_vehicles'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'АКПП', '️ АКПП', 'manage_options', 'akpp-transmissions', array($this, 'render_transmissions'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Парсер', '🌐 Парсер', 'manage_options', 'akpp-universal-parser', array($this, 'render_parser'));
        add_submenu_page('akpp-crm', 'Telegram CRM', ' Telegram', 'manage_options', 'akpp-telegram-crm', array($this, 'render_telegram_crm'));
    }
    
    public function render_dashboard() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        
        $stats = array(
            'total_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table"),
            'active_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status IN ('new', 'diagnostic', 'in_work')"),
            'completed_deals' => (int) $wpdb->get_var("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'"),
            'total_revenue' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(deal_price) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_parts_cost' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(parts_cost) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
            'total_salary' => (float) ($wpdb->get_var("SELECT SUM(employee_payment) FROM $deals_table WHERE status = 'completed'") ?: 0),
        );
        $stats['balance'] = $stats['total_revenue'] - $stats['total_parts_cost'] - $stats['total_salary'];
        
        $recent_deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/dashboard.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deals() {
        global $wpdb;
        $deals_table = $wpdb->prefix . 'akpp_deals';
        $deals = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM $deals_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deals.php';
    }
    
    public function render_deal_form() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $deal_id = isset($_GET['id']) ? intval($_GET['id']) : 0;
        $deal = null;
        
        if ($deal_id > 0) {
            $deal = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_deals WHERE id = %d",
                $deal_id
            ));
        }
        
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY name ASC");
        $brands = $wpdb->get_col("SELECT DISTINCT brand FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand ASC");
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code ASC");
        
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/deal-form.php';
    }
    
    public function render_employees() {
        global $wpdb;
        $employees = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_employees ORDER BY name ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/employees.php';
    }
    
    public function render_vehicles() {
        global $wpdb;
        $vehicles = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_vehicles ORDER BY brand, model, year_from DESC LIMIT 500");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/vehicles.php';
    }
    
    public function render_transmissions() {
        global $wpdb;
        $transmissions = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}akpp_transmissions ORDER BY code ASC");
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/transmissions.php';
    }
    
    public function render_parser() {
        include get_template_directory() . '/inc/crm/templates/parser.php';
    }

                                Узнайте ID через <a href="https://t.me/userinfobot" target="_blank" style="color: #00ff88;">@userinfobot</a>

                    </div>

                        <code>/newdeal [телефон] [имя] [авто]</code> — Создать сделку
                    </div>
                    <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;">
                        <code>/deals</code> — Список сделок

                        <code>/search [текст]</code> — Поиск
                    </div>
                    <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;">
                        <code>/help</code> — Помощь
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('#test-connection-btn').on('click', function() {
                const btn = $(this);
                const result = $('#test-result');
                btn.prop('disabled', true).text(' Проверка...');
                result.css('color', '#fbbf24').text('Проверка...');
                
                $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                    action: 'akpp_telegram_test_connection',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(response) {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔍 Проверить соединение');
                    if (response.success) {
                        result.css('color', '#10b981').text('✅ ' + response.data.message);
                    } else {
                        result.css('color', '#ef4444').text('❌ ' + response.data.message);
                    }
                }).fail(function() {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔍 Проверить соединение');
                    result.css('color', '#ef4444').text(' Ошибка соединения');
                });
            });
            
            $('#setup-webhook-btn').on('click', function() {
                const btn = $(this);
                const result = $('#test-result');
                btn.prop('disabled', true).text('⏳ Установка...');
                result.css('color', '#fbbf24').text('Установка webhook...');
                
                $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                    action: 'akpp_telegram_setup_webhook',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(response) {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔄 Переустановить Webhook');
                    if (response.success) {
                        result.css('color', '#10b981').text('✅ ' + response.data.message);
                        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 2000);
                    } else {
                        result.css('color', '#ef4444').text('❌ ' + response.data.message);
                    }
                }).fail(function() {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text(' Переустановить Webhook');
                    result.css('color', '#ef4444').text('❌ Ошибка соединения');
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }
}

new AKPP_CRM_Admin();
```

---

## ✅ Что добавлено:

| Функция | Статус |
|---------|--------|
| `ajax_telegram_test()` — тест подключения к Telegram API | ✅ |
| `ajax_telegram_webhook()` — установка webhook | ✅ |
| Пункт меню "📱 Telegram" | ✅ |
| Страница настроек с тестом и webhook | ✅ |
| Проверка Bot Token и Chat ID | ✅ |
| Отправка тестового сообщения | ✅ |
| Подробные сообщения об ошибках | ✅ |

---

## 🚀 Как использовать:

1. **Замените** `inc/crm/class-crm-admin.php` на код выше
2. **Обновите страницу** (Ctrl+Shift+R)
3. **Зайдите** в CRM → 📱 Telegram
4. **Нажмите** "🔍 Проверить соединение" — увидите статус бота
5. **Нажмите** "🔄 Переустановить Webhook" — настроите webhook

**Готово!** 🎉

### USER
❌ Таймаут. Telegram заблокирован на хостинге. Настройте прокси.
Сделай настройки проски для бота отдельно и впн (в мень нужно оставить только телеграмм срм, не нужно дублировать)

### ASSISTANT
# 📄 `inc/crm/class-telegram-crm.php` — полный файл с прокси

```php
<?php
/**
 * Telegram CRM Bot with Proxy Support
 * @package AKPP_Kurgan
 * @version 2.0.0
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) exit;

class AKPP_Telegram_CRM {
    
    private $bot_token;
    private $proxy_host;
    private $proxy_port;
    private $proxy_type;
    private $proxy_user;
    private $proxy_pass;
    private $webhook_url;
    
    public function __construct() {
        $this->bot_token = trim(get_option('akpp_tg_bot_token', ''));
        $this->proxy_host = trim(get_option('akpp_tg_proxy_host', ''));
        $this->proxy_port = intval(get_option('akpp_tg_proxy_port', 0));
        $this->proxy_type = get_option('akpp_tg_proxy_type', 'http');
        $this->proxy_user = trim(get_option('akpp_tg_proxy_user', ''));
        $this->proxy_pass = trim(get_option('akpp_tg_proxy_pass', ''));
        $this->webhook_url = admin_url('admin-ajax.php?action=akpp_tg_webhook');
        
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_menu'));
        add_action('admin_init', array($this, 'register_settings'));
        
        // Webhook (публичный)
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_webhook', array($this, 'handle_webhook'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_akpp_tg_webhook', array($this, 'handle_webhook'));
        
        // AJAX обработчики
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_test_connection', array($this, 'ajax_test'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_setup_webhook', array($this, 'ajax_setup_webhook'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_save_lead', array($this, 'ajax_save_lead'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_save_deal', array($this, 'ajax_save_deal'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_get_stats', array($this, 'ajax_get_stats'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_get_deals', array($this, 'ajax_get_deals'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_akpp_tg_get_leads', array($this, 'ajax_get_leads'));
    }
    
    public function add_menu() {
        // ОДИН пункт меню
        add_submenu_page(
            'akpp-crm',
            'Telegram CRM',
            '📱 Telegram',
            'manage_options',
            'akpp-telegram',
            array($this, 'render_page')
        );
    }
    
    public function register_settings() {
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_bot_token');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_notify_chat');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_authorized_users');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_proxy_host');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_proxy_port');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_proxy_type');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_proxy_user');
        register_setting('akpp_tg_settings', 'akpp_tg_proxy_pass');
    }
    
    /**
     * Отправка запроса к Telegram API с поддержкой прокси
     */
    private function tg_request($method, $data = array()) {
        if (empty($this->bot_token)) {
            return new WP_Error('no_token', 'Bot token не задан');
        }
        
        $url = "https://api.telegram.org/bot{$this->bot_token}/{$method}";
        
        // Если есть прокси - используем cURL напрямую
        if (!empty($this->proxy_host) && $this->proxy_port > 0) {
            return $this->curl_request($url, $data);
        }
        
        // Без прокси - стандартный WordPress
        $response = wp_remote_post($url, array(
            'body' => $data,
            'timeout' => 30,
            'sslverify' => false,
        ));
        
        if (is_wp_error($response)) return $response;
        
        return json_decode(wp_remote_retrieve_body($response), true);
    }
    
    /**
     * Запрос через cURL с прокси
     */
    private function curl_request($url, $data) {
        $ch = curl_init();
        
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POST, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS, http_build_query($data));
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 30);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST, 0);
        
        // Настройка прокси
        $proxy_type = CURLPROXY_HTTP;
        if ($this->proxy_type === 'socks5') {
            $proxy_type = CURLPROXY_SOCKS5;
        } elseif ($this->proxy_type === 'socks4') {
            $proxy_type = CURLPROXY_SOCKS4;
        }
        
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_PROXY, $this->proxy_host);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_PROXYPORT, $this->proxy_port);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_PROXYTYPE, $proxy_type);
        
        if (!empty($this->proxy_user)) {
            curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_PROXYUSERPWD, "{$this->proxy_user}:{$this->proxy_pass}");
        }
        
        $response = curl_exec($ch);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        $http_code = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        curl_close($ch);
        
        if ($response === false) {
            return new WP_Error('curl_error', $error);
        }
        
        if ($http_code !== 200) {
            return new WP_Error('http_error', "HTTP {$http_code}: {$response}");
        }
        
        return json_decode($response, true);
    }
    
    /**
     * Отправка сообщения
     */
    public function send_message($chat_id, $text, $keyboard = array()) {
        $data = array(
            'chat_id' => $chat_id,
            'text' => $text,
            'parse_mode' => 'HTML',
        );
        
        if (!empty($keyboard)) {
            $data['reply_markup'] = json_encode(array('inline_keyboard' => $keyboard));
        }
        
        return $this->tg_request('sendMessage', $data);
    }
    
    /**
     * Рендер страницы
     */
    public function render_page() {
        $active_tab = isset($_GET['tab']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['tab']) : 'bot';
        ?>
        <div class="wrap akpp-crm-dashboard">
            <h1>📱 Telegram CRM</h1>
            
            <!-- Вкладки -->
            <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.2); padding-bottom: 10px;">
                <a href="?page=akpp-telegram&tab=bot" class="button <?php echo $active_tab === 'bot' ? 'button-primary' : ''; ?>">🤖 Настройки бота</a>
                <a href="?page=akpp-telegram&tab=proxy" class="button <?php echo $active_tab === 'proxy' ? 'button-primary' : ''; ?>">🌐 Прокси / VPN</a>
                <a href="?page=akpp-telegram&tab=stats" class="button <?php echo $active_tab === 'stats' ? 'button-primary' : ''; ?>">📊 Статистика</a>
            </div>
            
            <?php if ($active_tab === 'bot'): ?>
                <?php $this->render_bot_settings(); ?>
            <?php elseif ($active_tab === 'proxy'): ?>
                <?php $this->render_proxy_settings(); ?>
            <?php elseif ($active_tab === 'stats'): ?>
                <?php $this->render_stats(); ?>
            <?php endif; ?>
        </div>
        <?php
    }
    
    /**
     * Вкладка: Настройки бота
     */
    private function render_bot_settings() {
        ?>

                               placeholder="123456:ABC-DEF1234ghIkl-zyx57W2v1u129ew11"
                               style="width: 100%; font-family: monospace;">
                        <small style="color: #6b7280;">Получите через <a href="https://t.me/BotFather" target="_blank" style="color: #00ff88;">@BotFather</a></small>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-row">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label>Chat ID для уведомлений</label>

                               placeholder="-1001234567890">
                        <small style="color: #6b7280;">Узнайте через <a href="https://t.me/userinfobot" target="_blank" style="color: #00ff88;">@userinfobot</a></small>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label>Авторизованные пользователи (по одному ID на строку)</label>
                        <textarea name="akpp_tg_authorized_users" rows="4" 
                                  style="width: 100%; font-family: monospace;"><?php 
                            echo esc_textarea(get_option('akpp_tg_authorized_users', '')); 
                        ?></textarea>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-actions">
                    <?php submit_button('💾 Сохранить'); ?>
                    <button type="button" id="tg-test-btn" class="button"> Тест подключения</button>
                    <button type="button" id="tg-webhook-btn" class="button">🔄 Установить Webhook</button>
                    <span id="tg-result" style="margin-left: 20px; font-weight: bold;"></span>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
        
        <div class="akpp-form-section">
            <h3>📖 Команды бота</h3>
            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr)); gap: 15px;">
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/start</code> — Начать</div>
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/newlead</code> — Создать лид</div>
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/newdeal</code> — Создать сделку</div>
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/deals</code> — Список сделок</div>
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/leads</code> — Список лидов</div>
                <div style="background: rgba(0,255,136,0.05); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px;"><code>/stats</code> — Статистика</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('#tg-test-btn').on('click', function() {
                const btn = $(this);
                const result = $('#tg-result');
                btn.prop('disabled', true).text('⏳ Тест...');
                result.html('');
                
                $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                    action: 'akpp_tg_test_connection',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(r) {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔍 Тест подключения');
                    if (r.success) result.css('color', '#10b981').text('✅ ' + r.data.message);
                    else result.css('color', '#ef4444').text(' ' + r.data.message);
                });
            });
            
            $('#tg-webhook-btn').on('click', function() {
                const btn = $(this);
                const result = $('#tg-result');
                btn.prop('disabled', true).text('⏳ Установка...');
                
                $.post(akppCrm.ajaxUrl, {
                    action: 'akpp_tg_setup_webhook',
                    nonce: akppCrm.nonce
                }, function(r) {
                    btn.prop('disabled', false).text('🔄 Установить Webhook');
                    if (r.success) {
                        result.css('color', '#10b981').text('✅ ' + r.data.message);
                        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
                    } else {
                        result.css('color', '#ef4444').text(' ' + r.data.message);
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
    }
    
    /**

    private function render_proxy_settings() {

        <div class="akpp-form-section">

                    </tr>
                    <tr>
                        <td>Telegram Official 3</td>
                        <td><code>91.108.56.130</code></td>
                        <td><code>443</code></td>
                        <td>HTTP</td>
                        <td><button class="button button-small use-proxy" data-host="91.108.56.130" data-port="443" data-type="http">Использовать</button></td>
```
